item.title: Goddesses' Whim 女神的心血来潮
item.description:
Goddesses’ Whim [v0.4.6b] [Ncrow]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You, the protagonist of all this, with a big heart (and something else..) because of your past, are someone with a boring and lonely life. But one day, given by your personality to help others no matter what, you decide to give your life for another, which attracts the attention of a certain goddess. Now, with the opportunity to return to live in another world given by the capricious goddesses that you will meet on your way, you have the chance to start over. All goddesses seek not to be bored, and you will soon discover that some can be more capricious than others. What awaits you? What kind of people will you meet? And obviously, how many girls will be madly in love with you?​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.4.6b
  • 发行日期：2026-06-01

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Discord
  • Itch.io

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 质量很高，值得一玩
  • 还有就是0.4.5b版本任务没有汉化，你们又不反馈，我跑0.4.6b玩了一下才知道的…
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.06.02 01:00 0.4.6b：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.06.02 01:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.06.02 01:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-06-02
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

游戏预览图

荤图

DOWNLOAD（汉化补丁）

0.4.6b

Win/Linux（PC端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：MEDIAFIRE
  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱发电
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱赞助
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将汉化补丁rpa文件放入game文件夹中
  • 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可
  1. 温馨提示：
  • 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒
  • 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程
  • 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电
  • 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！

Android（安卓端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：MEDIAFIRE
  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱发电
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱赞助
  • 主体APK：GOFILE
  • 主体APK：PIXELDRAIN
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版、AI意译汉化补丁和主体APK
  • 安装APK文件
  • 启动游戏，放行所有权限
  • 这时游戏会闪退，如果没有闪退，就自己手动大退
  • 然后解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将英文原版game文件夹中的所有文件及文件夹和汉化补丁rpa文件一起移动到以下路径： 
    1

    Documents/RenPy_Saves/com.luoqian.GoddessesWhim/game
  • 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可
  • PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。

  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱赞助

item.title: Heart Problems 情感问题
item.description:
Heart Problems [v0.10] [Xenorav]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In HeartProblems you play as a guy who, after losing his parents, moves in with his uncle Davie. As the years pass and he reaches sexual maturity, he begins to realize that he lives with three incredibly beautiful women…​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Chapter 10
  • 发行日期：2025-07-29

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Subscribestar

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这部小说最大的卖点就是姨妈，姨妈一上垒就可以完结，就可以弃坑了，当然，作者肯定不会，至少要拖个一两年。
博文更新日志

  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。

item.title: Special Harem Class 特殊后宫班
item.description:
Special Harem Class [v0.4.6 P2] [KagetoDev]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Hate to break it to you, but you haven’t been accepted in any college your applied for. Bummer. But don’t worry! There’s this special pre-college program you found online, that happens to have only beautiful girls as students! But wait, the teacher is a pervert!?
剧情概要
  • In Special Harem Class you play as an unexpected student in this pre-college program, and conspire with Claire, your pervert teacher, to get close to the other students. What girl will better catch your eye? And don’t forget to explore the town, everywhere you look there’s a beautiful sight waiting to be seen!

游戏信息

item.title: Ethereal Ties 虚幻的羁绊
item.description:
Ethereal Ties [Holiday Special v1.0] [NevenVN]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Navigate strange occurrences that disrupt your once-mundane existence. When an unexpected death sends you back in time, you discover the unique ability to reset the day through your own demise. Along the way, you’ll encounter intriguing characters, form relationships, and possibly even find romance, all while uncovering the hidden world of “Diviners”—individuals with extraordinary powers. You must learn to survive in a society determined to eradicate you. Prepare for a journey of suspense, mystery, and supernatural twists as you delve into the unknown.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine

item.title: Genesis Proyect 创世计划
item.description:
Genesis Proyect [v0.2] [ArtoriasRey]

剧情概要
  • Some time ago…Humans lived alongside demons and angels…beings from the deepest hell and others from the highest heavens….One day… it all ended A virus arrived in the world, unleashing chaos in many places It is the DRP disease (Primary Reproductive Dysfunction) Which was the cause of the world’s political, economic, and social collapse​

item.title: Moonlight 月光
item.description:
Moonlight [Ep.3 v0.03.10] [BigBat_Productions]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Moonlight is a thought-provoking adult visual novel set in a dystopian near-future where technology and humanity collide in unexpected ways. In the world of Moonlight, Neural Implants (NIs) have become an integral part of daily life, controlling everything from communication to dopamine production. A new app has recently entered the market, allowing people to escape into a virtual world while their bodies are controlled by AI and sent out to work. But not everyone is content with this tech-dominated society. You’ll step into the shoes of a Detective, a weathered investigator driven by personal loss, as he unravels the dark secrets behind a mysterious death. As you dive deeper into the investigation, you’ll find yourself entangled in a web of leads, each more complex and dangerous than the last. Expect a game rich in story, with complex characters, emotional twists and turns, and passionate scenes.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Studio Hearts 心之工作室：公车上锁
item.description:
Studio Hearts [v0.3] [Atemsiel]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In Studio Hearts, you play as Marcus (Or a custom name), a 30 year old Capital Raising Associate living and working in London. He doesn’t get too much time for a personal life as a result of work, and approximately three years before the start of the story, he finds himself filling the void by talking to a camgirl, Mila, whose name can also be customised. She’s a 22 year old woman who’s been solo camming since shortly after her 18th birthday, with it subtly or not so subtly affecting almost all aspects of her life. Her goals, friendships, and even her personality have all been influenced by her work.
剧情概要
  • Over time, she becomes closer to Marcus than any of her other viewers. Close enough to reveal her real location, which she usually keeps secret for her own safety. She lives in the fictional Russian speaking country of Kharzovya, which whilst western in many ways, is also very culturally distinct from what Marcus is used to, especially with respect to how they view relationships. One day, Marcus is a presented with a work opportunity that would have him moving out of London, and it’s from there that the story begins…

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2

item.title: Apocalust 天欲启示录
item.description:
Apocalust [v0.09] [Psychodelusional]

Overview

剧情概要
  • “A reversed pentagram, with two points projecting upwards, is a symbol of evil and attracts sinister forces because it overturns the proper order of things and demonstrates the triumph of matter over spirit. It is the goat of lust attacking the heavens with its horns, a sign execrated by initiates.” You are a young man and budding photographer. You live an average and moral life, just trying to figure things out in the world until you come into contact with an ancient, otherworldly relic, granting you a powerful set of “strange” and “meta physical” abilities. More, Teaser and Character Introduction

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

item.title: Broken Dreams 破碎之梦
item.description:
Broken Dreams [v0.5.1] [Biggering]

Overview

剧情概要
  • “You wake up in your boring life as a psychologist, go to work like any other day at the university, finish your day and go to a bar, and in the blink of an eye… you are no longer you. Now, several girls go to your office looking for your help. You can no longer control your emotions and a beautiful girl starts visiting you in your dreams. Who is she? Why does your life begin to have no meaning? Who are you? Uncover the mysteries of your new life as you “help” various girls solve their personal problems and possibly find love. A story of romance, mystery, and personal growth… Are you ready, Dreamer?”​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: If Love Had Found Us First 如果爱先找到我们
item.description:
If Love Had Found Us First [Part 1] [OrbOrigin]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In hopes of recovering from a painful breakup, you reluctantly attend a summer beach party where you meet a married woman whose warmth and charm quickly captivate you. Despite the boundaries of her family life, the two of you begin a secret affair, each seeking affection, desire, and connection in one another.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Move the Chains 决胜锋线
item.description:
Move the Chains [v0.4] [MissFortune]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Move The Chains is a choice-driven adult visual novel that puts you into the shoes of a hot-button athlete who finds himself being given a second chance after spending a year behind bars. The road to redemption is a long one, but it’s packed with girls, love, drama, and of course, sex.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.4
  • 发行日期：2026-05-26

Changelog

更新日志

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Subscribestar
  • Twitter
  • Steam

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 质量不错，值得一玩，温馨提醒，有futa。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.31 16:00 0.4：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.31 16:00 汉化补丁：集成选项mod ✅
2026.05.31 16:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.06.07 16:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-31
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

素图

item.title: Shadows of Desire 欲望之影（福臭者联盟）
item.description:
Shadows of Desire [v0.9.5] [Shamantr]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The life of a short man is difficult, even more so having a spectacular girlfriend and being surrounded by bad people. Fred is that man, he isn’t racist, but the man who made his life a hell is black, he bullied Fred in every year on school but, this year is different, it’s their last year of classes and things seem to be going well. ¿Will Fred be able to finish the year with his relationship intact?​ is told from Bea’s POV. In the first episode, you will get to know Kat, her coworker, and Hart, a new wild card that is introduced into Bea’s life.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: The Big Step 向前一小步，文明一大步
item.description:
The Big Step [S.2 - v0.2] [Partedes]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Follow Samantha’s adventures at college, at work, and at home…​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.4
  • 发行日期：2026-05-26

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Subscribestar
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 好像是重金属加伦理的，但是我不玩啊。不过F95上，短短几个月评价有100多个啊，所以就跑一个吧，你们试试咸蛋。
  • 但是原文是西班牙文，我是拿英文来跑的，质量应该是没问题的，可能英文文件可能排序不太一样，不知道哪里会不会出现幻觉。
  • 有问题的话再跑一次西班牙文吧，我是比较喜欢跑英文的，因为西班牙文看不懂，不太好修bug。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.31 22:00 Season 2 - 0.2：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.31 22:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.06.07 22:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
2026.05.31 22:00 Season 1 - 1.0：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.31 22:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.06.07 22:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-31
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

item.title: xxxFiles 开心超人
item.description:
xxxFiles [v0.2.2] [Caine.Totally.Sane]

Overview

剧情概要
  • About this game. Basically Prototype (or Venom) but with sex. Not much to say here. You don’t have a traumatic past or anything, just an alien who enjoys copulating.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.2.2
  • 发行日期：2026-05-30

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Twitter
  • Pixiv

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 妈的，要玩这游戏真不容易呀，首先是电话短信代码不支持中文，不得不做一个支持中文外置mod
  • 好，那么这一关搞完，还有下一关，作者魔改设定代码，导致与补丁冲突，一返回主菜单，读取存档，打开画廊，嘎嘎报错，当然，功夫不负有心人，也是解决了这个bug
  • 妈的，搞完这个，还有下一关，画廊只显示原游戏字体，导致中文渲染不出来，全是方框，真的，没完没了，但道高一尺魔高一丈，画廊除了主角名字显示方框，其他的终于解决了
  • 不容易啊，好，现在说说游戏吧，原名是叫XXX档案，但是拔度很高，所以叫做开心超人，而且文笔特别好，写得特别有感觉，无论是御姐女上司，还是萝莉继女，假小子，人妻，老婆，御姐校长，慈母生物老师，死鱼厌世女等等，统统收入胯下，各种XP全满足了，扶她，触手，露出，睡J，NTL，千言万语汇聚成四个字，不玩白瞎。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.31 13:00 0.2.2：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.31 13:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.06.07 13:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2025-05-31
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

Win/Linux（PC端）

0.2.2
修复mod
  • 电话短信修复mod：GOFILE
  • 电话短信修复mod：PIXELDRAIN
  • 把这个mod打在game文件夹中，必须打，不打你就等着嘎嘎报错吧
  • 如果打完汉化补丁，设置右下角不显示语言选项，那就打一个默认中文的mod
  • 默认中文mod：GOFILE
  • 默认中文mod：PIXELDRAIN
  • 细心的水友已经发现啊，这次更新画廊会报错啊，所以我们打一个修复mod
  • 修复mod：GOFILE
  • 修复mod：PIXELDRAIN
  • 要玩这游戏真不容易呀
  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：VIKINGFILE
  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱发电
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱赞助
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将汉化补丁rpa文件放入game文件夹中
  • 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可

item.title: Angel's Love 天使之爱
item.description:
Angel’s Love [v0.4 PE] [GPoint]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Angel’s love— 一部情色视觉小说。一个身体里有两个灵魂对抗：谦虚有教养的Angel和侵入她身体的淫荡好色的魅魔。在这种情况下能否成为流行巨星并向前任复仇呢？

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.4 PE
  • 发行日期：2026-05-30

  • Itch.io
  • Steam

item.title: Aurora Protocol 奥萝拉协议
item.description:
Aurora Protocol [v0.5 Public] [Astghik]

Overview

item.title: The Headmaster 校长先生
item.description:
The Headmaster [v0.17.3.2] [Altos and Herdone]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In the not too distant future, on a small island nation, a crisis has arisen. The number of students graduating from school has fallen sharply and university places are going unfilled. Faced with the prospect of mass unemployment and potential economic disaster the government is forced to introduce emergency measures. All students over eighteen who failed or were expelled from school are to be forced back into education at a number of special facilities.
Spoiler: More
  • In The Headmaster you play an expert in young adult psychology with some unique ideas about how to tackle the crisis. After a demonstration of your theories at a teachers conference you are approached by the agent of a mysterious organisation. He invites you to interview for the position of headmaster (principal) at one of the newly founded schools for over eighteen year olds. Keen to prove yourself and your theories you gladly accept.
  • Using your unique disciplinary methods you must turn a whole school of delinquent young women into hard working and obedient students. Things will not be easy for you. You must win your colleagues to your side, cater to the unusual demands of the schools owners and deal with a troublesome government inspector.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: After Dark 夜幕降临
item.description:
After Dark [v0.25.2] [Bozavest]

Overview

剧情概要
  • After Dark is a gripping visual novel that tells the story of a boy who hasn’t been able to sleep for over 10 years, haunted by the shadows of an event he can’t remember. Feeling disconnected from the world and struggling to forge meaningful connections, his life takes a sudden turn at the start of his final year of school. A chance encounter with a mysterious, mystical figure reveals that his destiny is far greater than he ever imagined.​

游戏信息

item.title: Companion of Darkness 黑暗伴侣
item.description:
Companion of Darkness [S2 Ch.12.5] [Berkili4]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 3 years after a tragic incident, you return to your hometown. Just before you reach your destination, you watch as two supernatural forces pit their strength against each other in a fight to the death.
  • It seems that you have been discovered and effortlessly overwhelmed, but instead of dying you wake up in your bed as if nothing had happened.
  • Was it all a dream?
  • Everyday life goes on whether you like it to or not. Not only do you feel like a stranger in your hometown, more and more unexplainable events are happening around you.
  • When the ones you care for are threatened, you must decide which boundaries you are willing to cross. And, if it is worth to give up humanity.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Season 2 Chapter 12.5
  • 发行日期：2026-05-26

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A.

Developer（入正地址）

  • SubscribeStar
  • Discord
  • Patreon
  • itch.io
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 只要能接受的了前期的渲染，建模，动画，后期的细糠不会辜负你的坚持
  • 其实是不想添加月订阅的，但是这游戏好烦，好几个设定，都需要统一，而且AI遇到这种设定，还会出现幻觉，导致文本变得文邹邹的，还不能再次跑一次AI，只能人工修改，没辙，主要原因就是Primordial，Dark One，这两个单词，好家伙，AI检测到这两个单词，原初，太古，远古，黑暗，几千，几万年前，就开始出现幻觉，所以部分剧情也会变得文邹邹，当然，我现在没时间玩，有时间玩，我在把文风改回来，当然，这些只是少数的，只要上下文没这些单词，就不会出现文邹邹的。
  • 最新版本没选项mod，mod作者还没更新，因为学习版泄露太快了——2026.05.29
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.29 17:00 Season 2 Chapter 12.5：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.29 17:00 汉化补丁：集成选项mod ✅
2026.05.29 17:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.06.05 17:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-29
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

游戏预览图

素图

Season 2 Chapter 12.5

Win/Linux（PC端）

存档
  • 存档：GOFILE
  • 存档：PIXELDRAIN

  • 当然，你们可以打自己的存档

    C:/Users/？？？/AppData/Roaming/RenPy/persistent

item.title: Kamogawa Island 鸭川岛
item.description:
Kamogawa Island [v0.2] [Fragolina Studio]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Step into a world where passion meets management in this NSFW anime style visual novel that blends immersive storytelling with interactive gameplay. In Kamogawa Island: My New Life at a Sex Resort, you’ll dive into a hedonistic paradise unlike any other—a floating luxury resort where your choices ignite a cascade of sensual adventures and personal growth.​..

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

item.title: Lustful College 春心荡漾学院
item.description:
Lustful College [v0.45] [Tinkel Studios]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Lustful College tells the story of a young man whose life spirals into depression after losing his parents at an early age. Just when everything seems lost, an unexpected letter from a prestigious college offers him a second chance. A life-changing journey filled with mystery, temptation, and unforgettable encounters. You will meet more than twenty unique characters with deep backstories, experience detailed and logical storytelling, uncover side characters’ lives, and dive into a world full of action, drama, and secrets.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说

  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: What We Left Behind 我们留下的印记
item.description:
What We Left Behind [v0.0.2] [Dreamscape Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Often in life, it’s those flashpoint moments that cause us to reflect on the decisions we’ve made, the directions we’re going, and the things that are truly important. For Kareem, a failed promotion attempt and the death of his closest friend; for Nami, the reality of her failing artistic endeavors and a family legacy she never wanted as her own. Two strangers reckoning with pivotal forks, whose chance meeting will intertwine the webs of their lives forever. What lessons in love will one teach? Will it hurt? Will it heal? Will it push them towards or away from the paths they were meant to take? Help them choose what must be left behind, that they may grow into whom they’re suppose to be.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Intertwined 情意绵绵
item.description:
Intertwined [v0.15.4] [Nyx]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The story centers around you, a 18-year-old man who returns to his hometown after living with his dad for the past 5 years. Discover what you left behind. Rekindle old friendships, start new relationships. Find out how all of them are “Intertwined”!​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.15
  • 发行日期：2026-05-08

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 可还行？水友推荐的，放心玩。

日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.27 23:00 0.15.4：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.27 23:00 汉化补丁：集成完整体选项mod、作弊mod ✅
2026.05.27 23:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.05.27 23:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-27
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

素图

  • 完整体选项mod：GOFILE
  • 完整体选项mod：PIXELDRAIN
  • 这里是完整体选项mod，补丁里边也有个选项mod
  • 但是那个是不太适合这个游戏的，因为是单路线的
  • 这游戏是多路线的嘛，所以落谦也就提供了一个完整体的
  • 有需要的话，解压压缩包Game文件夹，覆盖Game文件夹即可
  • 补丁已内置汉化，无需担心打在本体无汉化
0.15.4patch
  • 0.15.4patch：GOFILE
  • 0.15.4patch：PIXELDRAIN
  • 这里是0.15.4的一个补丁，就是修复第15章出现的bug

  • 总之看你要不要打了，也是解压压缩包Game文件夹覆盖Game文件夹即可

item.title: ToxiCity 毒性
item.description:
ToxiCity [v0.18.0] [ILSProductions]

Overview

剧情概要
  • It rolled in slowly. In a town in its off-season, no one noticed when the city streets grew empty. No one thought twice about it when people called in sick. And then, while at work, John and his coworker, Kallie, witness an unusual fog surrounding their office. Cellphone service stopped. Phone lines went dead. Almost immediately, they lost contact with the outside world. When they went out to investigate, the fog burned their exposed skin and made them sick. Stranded, they have to find out what’s happening and how they might be rescued.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-21
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: AIRevolution AI革命
item.description:
AIRevolution [v0.3.8] [Akaime]

Overview

剧情概要
  • AIRevolution is a Visual Novel Game, sci-fi bathed with a shiny layer of fantasy. The world is crowded with Artificial intelligences, most of them looking like humans, they even managed to have the same rights as humans do in a ’near’ future. Will you accept them as equals or.. choose another path? You better decide fast, there is an AI Revolution incomming..

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

item.title: All Things Change 万物皆变
item.description:
All Things Change [v0.1.98RP] [ALDOR]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Writer’s block slowly forced you to stop writing. Success used to stick to you like a curse, but now you’ve decided to move on to something else. After many years, you decide to return to your hometown to clear your head, and take up the position of Director of the local academy, at the request of an old friend. Accompanied by Linda, the young woman you have been raising for many years, face a past you have tried to forget. Relive your past successes or make new friends, the choice is yours. You will also have to manage the academy and learn a few secrets. Young women eager to help you with your many tasks will not hesitate to use their charms.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.1.98RP - Prologue PART 1
  • 发行日期：2026-03-21

  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-20
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Artifice 诡计
item.description:
Artifice [v0.1] [Duve]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Do you love theater? Ever dreamed of standing in the spotlight? Let me offer you the starring role in my little production… I promise — it’ll be a performance you’ll never forget. Artifice is the debut spectacle of our theater, exploring a world filled with intrigue, secrets, and fake smiles. It showcases the beauty of theatrical productions and why theater is so amazing.
Spoiler: More
  • The main story revolves around a protagonist who is obsessed with findings his brother — the only person who truly understands and accepts him.

And for that, he agreed to join a mysterious organization that promised to aid his search… for a price. Now, he must flawlessly carry out every mission assigned to him. Whether that means charming diplomats, outwitting rivals, or navigating the affections of those drawn to his rising star.

And you, dear audience, will witness his most daring task yet: A grand competition held by the world’s leaders to celebrate the unveiling of the Last Wonder of the World!

But beware — every spotlight casts shadows. Will the price of his mission cost him more than he’s willing to give? Or will he play his role to perfection?

Only time will tell~ Enjoy the show and remember:

“All the world’s a stage, and all the men and women merely players.”

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Boundaries of Morality 道德的边界
item.description:
Boundaries of Morality [v0.720] [Novel]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Get ready for an exhilarating experience where every choice you make can either pave the way to success or drag your life into a spiral of intrigues and manipulations.
  • At the heart of the story is Emma, a young woman embarking on a new job in a major company. But she quickly realizes that the office walls hide not just career opportunities but also a tangled web of schemes and secrets she must skillfully navigate.
Spoiler
  • Your mission is to help Emma traverse this labyrinth of tough decisions. Lies, temptations, manipulations — or loyalty, honesty, and purity — the path you choose leads to unique outcomes. Boldness or caution? Ambition or moral principles? It’s up to you to shape her career and personal life.
  • Immerse yourself in a world where the choice between morality and ambition becomes a test of strength. “Boundaries of Morality” is a story where every decision matters. Your task is to find balance between career and personal relationships—whether by staying true to yourself or completely transforming. Are you ready to face the challenges of destiny and emerge victorious?

item.title: Harem of Ankhutep 安库特普的后宫
item.description:
Harem of Ankhutep [v0.24] [AhaNubis]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Harem of Ankhutep is an adult visual novel set in a fantasy world inspired by Egyptian myths. It’s a passion project with a cast made of original characters I started making long before I started making the game. At the start of the game, you arrive in the great city of Ankhutep as an ordinary, hard working man, down on his luck. You lived your whole life in a small secluded village, but external circumstances forced you out into the larger world. In Ankhutep you will meet the Netari. They are beings shaped by their divine ancestry, a fusion of gods and men. Some of them have long, furred ears, some may have a mushroom cap on their head, others may be ten times the size of an ordinary human. Your journey is shaped by the connections you build and the legacy you leave, both in the world and in their hearts. In a world born from the primordial abyss of Nu, the line between mortal and divine is a thin one. You see this connection every time you look at the Netari… And as they look back at you. Contains explicit sexual content, death (dead ends) and cult activities. Features a diverse cast of monster girls, each with her own unique personality, ambitions, and desires. No NTR & no cheating. The game is in an active development stage. Please keep spreading the word, join our Discord and rate the game! Thanks to all the support I can continue developing the game full time! Every little bit helps and keeps me motivated! Thank you! Gameplay trailer

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

item.title: Whispers of Desire 欲望的低语
item.description:
Whispers of Desire [v0.6] [Mr_Fable]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 讲述一对幸福已婚夫妻开启人生新篇章的故事。在新的机遇与社交环境中，意想不到的欲望与情感考验悄然浮现，挑战着他们之间的信任与羁绊。从双方视角体验剧情发展，你的每一个选择都将影响信任、爱情与他们共同的未来。

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio

item.title: MILFs of Sunville 徐娘半老
item.description:
MILFs of Sunville [S2 v12.00 Extra] [L7team]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Sunville的MILFs是一款成人游戏，讲述一个年轻人被迫离开大城市的奢华生活，回到小镇Sunville的大学。这是一款VN沙盒游戏，充满了美丽的女孩、浪漫、道德选择、优质的图形和炙热的动画。

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Season 2 - 12.00 Extra
  • 发行日期：2026-04-10

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Steam
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 好了，这次我把一二季都跑了一个AI，大家有需要的就打一下这个补丁吧
  • 目前的话，第一季安卓我修复了那个bug，是可以用外挂移植玩了
  • 第二季我外挂移之后，没有显示bug，但是直接闪退，连游戏都进不了，只能使用Joilay模拟器玩了。
  • 但是第一季的话，需要打一个修复mod，不打的话也只能通过Joilay模拟器玩，因为会一直报错。

item.title: Milfylicious 遗产继承人
item.description:
Milfylicious [Ch.II Remaster P1 Fix] [Maximus]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Milfylicious is a Mature Visual Novel that features numerous steamy scenarios, accompanied by sultry jazz music, voice acting and realistic adult sound effects. Additionally, players have the option to view their beloved ladies in a realistic representation.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Chapter II - Remaster Part 1 - Patreon - Fix
  • 发行日期：2026-03-05

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Subscribestar
  • Steam
  • Twitter
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 水友推荐的，纯拔作，拔度非常之高。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.27 02:00 Chapter2-0.37：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.27 02:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.06.03 02:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
2026.05.27 02:00 Chapter1-0.28：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.27 02:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.06.03 02:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-27
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

游戏预览图

荤图

DOWNLOAD（汉化补丁）

Chapter2-0.37

Win（PC端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：GOFILE
  • 英文原版：VIKINGFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱发电
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱赞助
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将汉化补丁rpa文件放入game文件夹中
  • 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可

item.title: Shut Up and Dance 沉寂之舞
item.description:
Shut Up and Dance [Ep.1-11 v1.0 SE] [Boring Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《闭嘴，跳舞吧：特别版》 - 是一部令人惊叹的高品质、动画效果极佳的成人视觉小说，它将带你进入美丽女士的世界，非同寻常的际遇，神秘而有趣的故事，你可以在其中做出许多决定并选择自己的道路！

  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio

item.title: So Much to Love 如此多值得爱
item.description:
So Much to Love [0.3.4b] [ALDOR]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Why did you do it? You have everything you need! A loving wife who will do anything for you. A successful business, and no financial problems. This time, your wife has had enough. Finally, she could not stand to catch you in the arms of another woman and has simply driven you out of the house. Unable to stay alone, you seek refuge at a childhood friend’s house, whom you haven’t seen for five years.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

item.title: The Grey Dream 格雷之梦
item.description:
The Grey Dream [Ep.7] [TheGreys]

Overview

剧情概要

《格雷之梦》是一部成人视觉小说，讲述了一名男子刚毕业就被一家国际贸易公司录用的故事。就在你接受这份工作的那一刻，过去所产生的结果随之开始浮现。谁知道呢？或许你可以借此摆脱过去，又或者你可以用过去来点缀未来。

item.description:
Rock the Rim [S1 Ep.1 P1] [RWA Studios]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 深入一款选择驱动的视觉小说，融合篮球梦想与音乐热情。塑造André的旅程，揭示隐藏的秘密，建立关系，在命运与戏剧的扣人心弦的谜团中追逐名声。

item.title: Cosy Cafe 温馨咖啡馆
item.description:
Cosy Cafe [v0.14.1] [Cosy Creator]

Overview

剧情概要

  • Your rough childhood is over, and you stand on the precipice of adulthood with a singular goal in mind: To become an exceptional restaurateur like your grandfather. But for now, you’ll settle for building a modest cafe. Money is tight, and challenges abound balancing your dream with your final year of school, but with hard work and determination you know that you can build a life for yourself and the girls you meet along the way.

  • In Cosy Cafe you will develop romantic and increasingly sexual relationships with a number of girls, culminating in a harem that eventually becomes a family. There will be a particular focus on wholesome maledom, and of course, there will be a lot of loving and kinky sex!

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.14.1
  • 发行日期：2026-05-15

Changelog

更新日志
  • MN/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Subscribestar
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏在外网好火，听说很暖很暧昧？这让我想到了鱼人二代的小说了，目前我自己是没时间玩，所以不知道剧情的底，但是CG的话，都是1-2s重复帧数，对比大作一般吧，就这样。

item.title: Finding Cloud 9 寻找极乐
item.description:
Finding Cloud 9 [v0.9.6] [Onyx Decadence]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Finding Cloud 9 is a slow-burn, story-driven adult visual novel about a college guy whose promising summer takes a dangerous turn when he’s coerced into drug production to protect the people close to him. As he juggles a normal life with a criminal one, intimate relationships, desire, and money begin to blur his sense of right and wrong. His naivety is slowly broken with each new situation, each new insight as he slowly becomes more and more realistic about his situation and every choice he makes pushes him closer to becoming either the man he believes he is… or someone who learns to ruthlessly justify crossing every line. This is a story about temptation, escalation, and the cost of wanting more. Whether you find your Cloud 9, or lose yourself chasing it, is up to you.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode 9 - Part 1 - 0.9.6
  • 发行日期：2026-05-14

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 可还行？质量很高，值得一玩。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.16 13:00 0.4.2：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.16 13:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.05.23 13:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-17
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: FreshWomen 新生也疯狂
item.description:
FreshWomen [Season 3 - 36%] [OppaiMan]

item.title: Good Luke 攻略豆包:开局先拿下邻居
item.description:
Good Luke [Alpha v1.1.0] [Good Luke]

Overview

剧情概要
  • This is just the point of the iceberg of we are planning. The game will be massive with interactions, mini games, quests, college girls, parties and much more.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Alpha 1.1.0
  • 发行日期：2026-05-16

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Twitter
  • SubscribeStar

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 3D区大佬跨行制作游戏，动画建模直接降维打击，不玩白瞎。
  • 这次更新啊，作者加了一个官中啊，但是感觉质量不太行啊，而且主包之前1.0的时候也有跑AI，那顺便把更新内容也跑一下吧
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.16 18:00 Alpha 1.1.0：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.16 18:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.05.23 18:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-16
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

荤图

item.title: Him 他
item.description:
Him [v0.4.2] [Kabuki]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You awaken in a medieval fantasy world full of elves, goblins and ogres. This is where a new life starts. Will you forge ahead as him, working solely for yourself, or will you emerge as a ray of hope for those in need? Your choices will dictate the fate of this harsh land and, in the end, your own.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

  • 发行日期：2026-05-13

item.title: Eruption Imminent 喷发在即
item.description:
Eruption Imminent [v0.7] [MorriganRae]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Eruption Imminent is an Adult Visual Novel that lets you steer the tumultuous journey of a young futanari as she begins finding her place in life. Discover sapphic romance, sexual adventures, intriguing new friends and foes, long-kept secrets, and budding mysteries in this thrilling erotic story.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio

  • Steam

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 可还行？水友推荐让跑的，建模很ok。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.15 11:00 Chapter 7 Fix：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.15 11:00 汉化补丁：集成选项mod、画廊mod、血缘mod ✅
2026.05.15 11:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.05.22 11:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-15
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

Overview

剧情概要
  • 这是一款3D成人视觉小说, 而你的选择将塑造人际关系, 竞争与扣人心弦的故事. 加入斯托克林堡学院的一位年轻法学生的旅程中, 感受戏剧冲突, 幽默, 小游戏, 浪漫情愫与全互动社交应用的体验.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-14
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Leaving DNA DNA罪证
item.description:
Leaving DNA [Ep. 5] [Impious Monk]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Leaving DNA is a story-driven adult visual novel with dark themes. Play as a criminal prosecutor whose commitment to the justice system is challenged when a cold case murder investigation leads to his father’s military special forces unit.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode 5
  • 发行日期：2026-05-13

item.title: Lesson in Loyalty 忠诚的教训
item.description:
Lesson in Loyalty [Ch.7 Fix] [RWA Studios]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Lesson in Loyalty 是一部融合野心、欲望与背叛的电影级成人视觉小说。私人家教 Kurt 的意外晋升考验着他的职业底线、人际关系与忠诚。为了通往成功，你愿意走多远？

游戏信息

游戏类型

item.title: Between Shadows: Yuria's Passion 尤莉娅的激情
item.description:
Between Shadows: Yuria’s Passion [Ch.4] [Shamantr]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 5 years before Shadows of Desire, Yuria took a long trip from the USA to the Congo with her husband Alvin and daughter Miley for work, Alvin’s job was in great demand in one of Congo’s most unfortunate shelters, where there is one particular refugee who is a bit… crazy… He will become obsessed with Yuria the moment he sees her, will Yuria be able to realize the real intentions of the crazy guy? And what if it is Yuria who becomes obsessed with him? Who knows, maybe Yuria’s job as a psychologist will be her downfall.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Oppai Odyssey 欧派奥德赛
item.description:
Oppai Odyssey [v0.5.1q] [Cryoxxx]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You are the captain of the USF starship Agni. Tasked with the mission of exploring uncharted planets in hopes of finding colonization targets, you will have the opportunity to experience the unique races and environments of the universe. Build friendship and share intimacy with your ragtag crew, as you traverse the mysteries of the universe and the nefarious plots of the USF. Oppai Odyssey features completely animated scenes and sexy situations.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.5.1q
  • 发行日期：2026-05-19

Changelog

  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • SubscribeStar
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏官中是机翻，很纯的机翻，但无关紧要，因为这游戏后面没啥剧情，就是无脑上垒，当然，有需要，我们也可以跑一个ai，有需要请在博客底下留言，看到我就去跑。

item.description:

剧情概要
  • Yesterday’s Crossroads is a choice-driven adult visual novel where every option leads to different outcomes. Meet a diverse cast of characters, each with their own personal struggles, and shape their stories along with your own.

  • 制作日期：2026-05-13
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。

item.title: Astreon 星宿
item.description:
Astreon [Ch.2 v0.4.5] [NoGlory]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In the year 2032, humanity stands on the brink of a technological breakthrough. A new material, developed by a group of scientists, possesses not only extraordinary strength, hyper-elasticity, and energy-saving properties, but also a unique, or rather exceptional, ability to self-repair. This capability turned the material into a regenerative pill, allowing people with limited abilities to become fully functional humans, while also making them stronger, smarter, and even extending their lifespan.
Spoiler: More
  • However, fearing the consequences of such power, the scientists decide to destroy the records, reports, and everything related to their research. They scattered, each going their own way. But as is often the case, someone found the remnants of this work. Ignoring the dangers, they decided to complete it, which eventually led to the formation of a globally banned terrorist organization called “Masquerade.” In response, leaders of major corporations launched a large-scale operation to eliminate the individual responsible and eradicate everything related to the research. You are a former soldier, unable to bear the guilt of the atrocities committed during the operation. You retreat to a remote location on the edge of the world, a small town cut off from the rest of civilization, where you planned to live a peaceful life with your wife and children, far removed from all the troubles of the past. But, as often happens, things do not go according to plan. One day, when your wife goes on a business trip to a certain research institute, she suddenly stops contacting you. In an attempt to find out what happened, you embark on a journey. Days, weeks, months, and years pass… Eventually, you come to terms with the fact that you may never see your wife again, burying all your emotions deep inside. Then, one day, your son arrives, asking for your help and with a glimmer of hope that not all is lost, that there is still a small chance to restore your peaceful life.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Chapter 2 - 0.4.5
  • 发行日期：2026-05-08

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏也是挺难绷的。原先是有官中的，但是由于作者不停的打剧情补丁，导致官中跑路了。然后我前几天跑了一个AI，然后他又发了个帖子，他又打了一些剧情补丁，所以不得不再跑一次AI。其实去年官中就跑路了，想玩这游戏，只能跑AI了，所以满打满算跑了三次AI。我不知道后面他还会不会再改剧情，如果改的话，可能要跑四次。我只能说牛逼。

item.title: My Girl Loves Handcuffs 我的女孩爱手铐
item.description:
My Girl Loves Handcuffs [v0.6] [395games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • MY GIRL LOVES HANDCUFFS is a kinky adult dating sim with a dash of mystery. After escaping her crazed, cult-following parents, your girl begins sleepwalking—stomping through your tiny apartment and waking you every night. Desperate for rest, the two of you buy a pair of handcuffs to keep her in bed. But to both your surprise, they bring far more than just peaceful nights. What follows is a lust-driven descent into your wildest fantasies. A guy. A girl. A pair of handcuffs. And a lot of kinky sex.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Blender
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.6
  • 发行日期：2026-05-09

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 作者怎么说呢？他第一部啊，做的挺好的，第二部就烂尾了，是他第三部，不知道会不会跑路。建模引擎不是DAZ Studio，而是Blender的，游戏又是沙盒，但是沙盒要提取的文本还是比较多的，不过我该提取的也提取了，不过客服工作那里的文本是显示不了汉化的。文本已经是提取出来了，不是没有提取啊，而是这作者写的代码是完全没有考虑多语言的兼容性。而我也懒得去魔改了。

item.title: Stuck in My Game 苟在3d区同人游戏开后宫
item.description:
Stuck in My Game [v0.10.0] [Niinko]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Being a game developer is no easy task, but finally,your game is ready to be released, and you’ll soon be able to…Oh no, an unfortunate accident has occurred.You are trapped inside a game – YOUR game.And after a closer look… Yes, it’s different, but why?Set out to uncover why, how, and who modified your game, and above all,how to escape from it…​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio

item.title: Shattered Minds 破碎的心灵
item.description:
Shattered Minds [v0.26 Beta] [eXtasy Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Shattered Minds is an open-world game, in which you take control over the life of a college student.
  • Your normal life is thrown out of whack after you realize you have the power to control the minds of others.
  • You will use this power to make all your dreams, desires and wishes come true!
  • A world with countless quests, figures, plots and locations are waiting to be discovered and controlled by you!
  • Shattered Minds includes plenty of animations, a licensed soundtrack and atmospheric sound effects!
  • Be ready to experience a game full of sexy adventures!
  • All paired with a thrilling, mysterious yet humorous plot.

item.title: She Might Be A Cuckqueen 她或许有绿帽癖
item.description:
She Might Be A Cuckqueen [v1.2.0] [ziglo]

Overview

剧情概要
  • She Might Be A Cuckqueen is a tightly-paced erotic comedy, about trying to figure out if your girlfriend likes it, or hates it, when you cheat on her. Or, perhaps both?
  • This is a short (<1 hour) kinetic novel, with a focus on pacing and dialogue.
  • It plays a bit more like a short Judd Apatow film, than it does like a standard AVN.
  • Imagine if Judd Apatow directed Porky’s. And if Porky’s was about cuckqueens, instead of… whatever Porky’s was about.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

item.title: Hail Dicktator 冰雹独裁者
item.description:
Hail Dicktator [v0.92.1] [Hachigames]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Down on your luck, you suddenly receive a letter from an uncle you never knew you had. He offers you a job to manage his tropical island resort. You find it’s full of beautiful women and a strange culture of punishment and reward. But perhaps the island itself is even stranger than the people that inhabit it… Build friendships and fall in love with the girls. Punish or reward them. Follow their stories. Explore the secrets of the island, upgrade the hotel, build more facilities. Maybe one day, you will become the new ‘Dicktator’! ‘Hail Dicktator’ features fetishes of all kinds already available in the game, including anal, bondage, spanking, tickling and feet.
  • As of 0.75, there are over 1500 events, over 16k renders, and over 250 full animations in the game. Additionally, a lot of slideshow mini-animations. Full animations are currently mostly in the later game.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

item.title: Time Heals 时间会治愈一切
item.description:
Time Heals [Ch.1 P2] [Owl’s]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Is more than a visual novel it’s a story of loss, crisis, and resilience. A 19-year-old loses everything, moves, makes new friends, and faces challenges. Family secrets, the Italian mafia, and pro racing on the tracks pull him into a high-stakes game.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Chapter 1 - Part 2
  • 发行日期：2025-11-30

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Steam
  • Boosty
  • Patreon
  • Trailer
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 可还行？有官中，但是是繁体中文，所以我自己跑了一个AI，不过看着一股夏日已逝的味道。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.08 20:00 Chapter 1 - Part 2：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.15 20:00 汉化补丁：道友境订阅 ✅
2026.05.15 20:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-08
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

item.title: Game of Hearts 红心游戏
item.description:
Game of Hearts [Steam R1] [SparkHG]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The next successor war dawns on Earth. A seat at the high table, once governed by a powerful demon, went vacant for unknown reasons. With a chance at a position of control, other lesser demons roused from their respective places, each with an aspiration of reaching the apex of power
Spoiler
  • But you, an outsider, knew nothing about it. A rude awakening haunted your place in the form of an armed assailant, and you’d be dead if it wasn’t due to a man who called himself your father.
  • Thrown into a different life, you must gather power from gaining loyal followers;
  • (mainly)women beguiled by your irresistible demonic charm. Seduce and corrupt your way into a stable life.
  • And then… maybe, just maybe, you might rise to the top.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.14 20:00 Steam R1：汉化补丁补链 ✅
2026.05.14 20:00 Steam R1：主体APK补链 ✅
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-27
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

荤图

Win（PC端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：GOFILE
  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：PIXELDRAIN
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将汉化补丁rpa文件放入game文件夹中
  • 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可

Android（安卓端）

  • PIXELDRAIN

  • 其实之前有水友让我制作一个，不过我太懒了，挺不好意思的，刚好这游戏前阵子更新了，顺便也为安卓的水友优化一下，毕竟就几行代码的事情
  1. 下载链接：

  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：PIXELDRAIN

  • 主体APK：PIXELDRAIN
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版、AI意译汉化补丁和主体APK
  • 安装APK文件
  • 启动游戏，放行所有权限
  • 这时游戏会闪退，如果没有闪退，就自己手动大退

  • 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可

item.title: The Office 办公室潜规则
item.description:
The Office [Episode 4 v0.1 Beta Fixed] [Damaged Coda]

Overview

剧情概要
  • This game is about Gail, a 27-year-old woman working in a financial services company called HI&F - Huge Investment and Finances. She is a street-smart lady who came from humble beginnings. She started as a receptionist after years of hard work and some harmless flirting. (So she thought.) After winning the fight against a colleague for her dream job. Gail gets promoted to the Regional Sales Manager position. That was the easy part, with potential enemies around every corner planning her downfall. What will she do to thrive and survive to reach her ultimate goal as CEO of HI&F?​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode 4 v0.1 Beta Fixed
  • 发行日期：2025-09-24

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 其实这游戏很久之前就跑好ai了，但是一直没时间修专有名词，如果你喜欢仙子的修行，琼明神女录，仙子，老奴来的题材的话，那么这部作品非常适合，反正我是挺中意这种女性堕落的题材，盖比一看就是这种料，如果做纯爱，那就是对这个建模的侮辱，那么这部作品，就很平平无奇了。

item.title: V.I.R.T.U.E.S. 美德
item.description:
V.I.R.T.U.E.S. [v17] [NoMeme]

Overview

剧情概要
  • This is a harem simulator. You, as a young capable college rich kid, versus 7 gorgeous girls with different backgrounds and personalities. The story is not only about sex, but also about romance and love fantasies. Try immerse yourself in the plots, discover more of the girls, and enjoy the feeling of developing your harem.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：PlayHome
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：17
  • 发行日期：2023-02-17

Changelog

更新日志
  • It has been almost 1 year since we released VIRTUES v16. Back then we really thought v16 would be the last major update of VIRTUES. We used 10 weeks to create an insane amount of content (700+ new pictures and 70+ animated scenes) and thought “this is it, we’ve put a good end to the journey of VIRTUES. It is not a perfect end, there are regrets, but it is still a good end. We made it. We finish our first project instead of abandoning it halfway. There may be a v17 at some point in the future, but it will be a minor update, you know, like a DLC kind of stuff.”
  • I kept this thought even until last December, until we really began to develop this v17 update. But as soon as I re-entered the world of VIRTUES, I changed my mind. I realized there were still so many things I want to tell, so many scenes I want to make for those girls, the girls that used to be a big part of my life for more than 2 years.
  • Thus I changed my plan, and I changed it again and again during the last two months. More and more scenes were added, more and more lines were written, and less and less time I slept every day. And in the end, this update became so big that we couldn’t even imagine it. It became even bigger than v16. It has more than 900+ new pictures and 70+ animated scenes, with the greatest amount of text.
  • V17 is the last major update of VIRTUES. It is the biggest update we’ve ever made, and maybe the lewdest one as well. Still, it is not a perfect end and there are regrets, but we have done our best and we hope you will enjoy our hard work.
  • I will write a post as the final summary of the journey of VIRTUES in a few days. As for now, let’s just take a brief look at what’s new in the update:
  • Irene’s solo ending
  • The silver kitten finally got her solo ending. Her ending contains two long branches, and each of them leads to a unique happy end. You will help this girl solve her confusion and decide the path of her future. Elisa’s solo ending
  • Just like her little daughter, this blonde milf’s solo ending also contains two long branches. This poor lady was deeply wounded from her previous marriage and she really needs you to take her away from the curse from her past.
  • The afterstory of your harem
  • There will be 4 major parts of your harem’s afterstory: Vera’s college dream, Uno’s real family, Senning’s daily life after her mother left the country, and the Shinyrost mother&daughter’s male worship. Each of them contains a tremendous amount of harem scenes.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Discord
  • Itch.io

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 很经典的一个游戏，CG放到现在依旧能打，而且瑟瑟剧情描写的很细腻，好像都有反差的那种，不愧是老艺术家的从容。
  • 当然，这游戏是沙盒的，所以会很多不能提取的文本，如果你遇到有些英文句子，影响到你游玩，请在博客留言，并且附上原文句子，我再去vscode上找到源码，再去通过ai汉化。

item.title: Beach Glass 海滩玻璃
item.description:
Beach Glass [Prologue v1.0] [OtterFly]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In ‘Beach Glass’ you follow Bea, a 20-something year-old with a want to break free of monotony and a need to find a missing fulfillment in her life.
剧情概要
  • When she impulsively departs on a road trip across Canada she meets the enigmatic Hart, a young woman with problems of her own and potentially dangerous secrets to keep.
  • On their journey they must each learn to confront the reality of whether or not they can find their way to their own better futures. “Bea hits the road.”
  • This story is told from Bea’s POV. In the first episode, you will get to know Kat, her coworker, and Hart, a new wild card that is introduced into Bea’s life.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 发行日期：2026-03-01

item.title: Milfy Day 蜜桃成熟时
item.description:
Milfy Day [v0.9.5] [Red Lighthouse]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Milfy Day is a visual novel game, you’ll play as a young man who has just moved into this small town. You’re staying with two hot mature women and their families. Because your family is going through a crisis, you need to revive your family, meet more local residents, help them and discover the secrets of the town. Of course the most important thing is that you have to successfully graduate and find a partner at the school prom.​

item.title: Tainted Harmony: A Succubus`s Embrace 污秽的和谐：魅魔之拥
item.description:
Tainted Harmony: A Succubus`s Embrace [v0.6.5 EA] [RaveDev]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Tainted Harmony is a story driven visual novel where desire, temptation, and morality collide. Step into a world where a succubus’s influence slowly tightens around your life, and every choice pulls you between resisting her corruption or letting it reshape who you are and the people you care about.​

item.title: The Creditor's Wife 债主之妻
item.description:
The Creditor’s Wife [v0.1d3][PolyPA]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In Creditor’s Wife, you play as a young man sold into “service” to repay his late mother’s debt. Now living as the house-boy in a luxurious mansion, you navigate bullying, tension, and heavy seduction from the creditor’s family. The story moves fast with no slow burn: steamy yoga + wine scenes with the hot MILF wife (Amelie), a risky bathroom peek, and the arrival of the smoking hot college professor Sophie who turns detention into a very private, teasing “tutoring” session.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

  • 制作日期：2026-05-12
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Inanna Revenge 伊南娜的复仇
item.description:
Inanna Revenge [v0.3.3] [AtemX Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In Inanna Revenge, you play as Arthur (customizable name), a 21-year-old young man living a dull and uneventful life with his stepsister—until one fateful day, that life comes to an abrupt end. But death doesn’t mark the end of your journey. A goddess named Ea offers you a chance to be reincarnated into a new world, one brimming with magic and adventure. What seems like the beginning of a fairy tale quickly reveals a harsher reality. To carve out your place in this new world, you’ll need to fight, face countless challenges, make tough decisions, and build meaningful relationships. Will you rise to the occasion, or be consumed by the trials ahead?
Spoiler
  • In Inanna Revenge, you won’t just control your character’s relationships with others, but also shape his personal development. Numerous choices allow you to develop your character into someone compassionate or ruthless, depending on your preferences. These choices will influence how your character interacts with others in various situations. Moreover, you can also affect the mentality of some of your love interests, deciding whether to pursue a romantic relationship with them or guide them into becoming submissive, obedient companions.
  • The game is a Visual Novel with a strong RPG feel. A turn-based combat system will be used to resolve certain conflicts, and your characters will gain levels, allowing them to allocate stat points and learn new skills. You’ll also find puzzles to solve later in the game.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: SnowStorm 雪暴（芝士雪豹）
item.description:
SnowStorm [v0.12] [GleenX Studio]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Far in the North, surrounded by lakes, mountains, and forests, three clans are coexisting in the strange village of Njardarheimr: the Hvitr Ulfr (White Wolves), the Myrk Hrafn (Dark Ravens), and the Bloba Bjorn (Bloody Bears).
  • Those clans are so different, nothing seems to bring them together, but when facing greater danger, they become the mighty Vikings. This epic adventure in the Northern lands will let you explore the ancient Norse mysteries, make important decisions, fight for your survival and meet a lot of beautiful girls. Whatever the path you choose, only the most determined survive.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio

  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: A Mother's Love 母亲的爱
item.description:
A Mother’s Love [Part 1-16 Plus] [OrbOrigin]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Your girlfriend’s mother doesn’t like you - doesn’t appreciate you for anything. Most of all, she wants you to leave her daughter because you’re in the way of her education. Little did she know, you have an affection for the mother and as she grows desperate to get rid of you, You both settle down of an agreement. An agreement that could change your whole relationship.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Part 1-16 Plus
  • 发行日期：2025-12-24

Changelog

更新日志
  • Fix the variable where you massage Nicole’s foot if you offered in Day 28.
  • Fix the bug with calling Nicole by her real name
  • Edit the walkthrough regarding calling Nicole by her real name
  • Splash screen has been updated with a new Motherly-Care Tier name list.
  • The Chapter Selection has been updated with Part 16.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

item.title: Deviant Anomalies 极度异常
item.description:
Deviant Anomalies [v0.9.5] [MoolahMilk]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A mysterious snowstorm engulfs the city and changes your life forever. Ever since the bizarre snowstorm, reports of supernatural occurrences begin to surface and crime rates are rising at an exponential level. Netherhelm is in chaos. YOU, fresh out of college and armed with a fancy degree in Criminal Psychology, decide to join law enforcement as a rookie detective. With a deep seated obsession to unravel the mysteries of the snowstorm, you solve case after case as you trudge along the strings of fate towards your final destiny.
剧情概要
  • Solve baffling cases, recruit Supernatural Anomalies into your team and help them control their newfound powers. The more uninhibited their minds are, the more their powers grow. Will you train these beautiful women with trust and respect? Or will you break their minds through sheer depravity and corruption? Will you build a team of based on the foundations of friendship and love? Or will you create a harem of cock-worshipping slaves who submit to your every whim and desire?
  • Either way, you are in a race against time. You better be ready, for The Watchmaker is coming. High quality renders with fully animated lewd scenes and immersive gameplay. The best is yet to come.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.9.5
  • 发行日期：2023-12-02

item.title: Domino Beach 多米诺海滩
item.description:
Domino Beach [Ep.3 Beta] [Mr Jet]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A young and ambitious man arrives in Domino Beach, the sunny city of his dreams, hoping to start a new life. But from the very beginning, nothing goes according to plan: he loses his job and then gets evicted from his apartment. By a twist of fate, he gets a chance to prove himself and join the team of beach lifeguards, with tryouts happening in a week. Will he be able to overcome this challenge, surrounded by so many temptations: beautiful girls, daredevil surfers, wild parties, and an ocean of alcohol?​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说

item.title: Echoes of 2990 2990的回声
item.description:
Echoes of 2990 [Ch.2 0.2.3] [AADev]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The year is 2990. You’re a rebellious punk fresh out of high school — all defiance and devil-may-care charm — until one punch changes everything. It was supposed to be just another fight, another middle finger to the system. But your opponent? Your teacher. His fist didnât just knock you down — it knocked something loose. Now you’re seeing flashes of the future. This isn’t a gift. It’s a glitch in reality. And it’s your ticket onto a high-stakes deep-space mission, alongside a crew of sassy, seductive women.
  • Destination: Andromeda
  • Mission: Forge a new world, connect with alien civilizations, and carve your legacy — as a king, a conqueror… or the heart of a harem. The story is yours to shape.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

item.title: House of Hearts 红心之屋
item.description:
House of Hearts [Ep.2 P.1] [SparkHG]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The next successor war dawns on Earth. A seat at the high table, once governed by a powerful demon, went vacant for unknown reasons. With a chance at a position of control, other lesser demons roused from their respective places, each with an aspiration of reaching the apex of power
Spoiler
  • But you, an outsider, knew nothing about it. A rude awakening haunted your place in the form of an armed assailant, and you’d be dead if it wasn’t due to a man who called himself your father.
  • Thrown into a different life, you must gather power from gaining loyal followers;
  • (mainly)women beguiled by your irresistible demonic charm. Seduce and corrupt your way into a stable life.
  • And then… maybe, just maybe, you might rise to the top.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode 2 Part 1
  • 发行日期：2026-02-13

Changelog

更新日志
  • Grammar and spelling fix mod, courtesy of sac812(official). The file is named: GameOfHearts_EditedScript_Ch5Pt2_Public.zip
  • As per usual, if you used modded saves and scripts, the mods will have to be adapted to the public release before your saves can be used again. Please consult the mod author for an update before proceeding.
  • Developer Notes updated. Please read it if you want to know about the sequel.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Steam
  • Discord
  • Twitter

item.title: Summer Heat 夏日猎艳记
item.description:
Summer Heat [v0.6.1] [Naughty Fox Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Experience the ups and downs of summer class! Meet girls, earn their trust (or break their hearts) and practice your photography skill in the process. No matter what you choose, you’ll feel the heat.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.6.1
  • 发行日期：2024-09-01

Changelog

更新日志
  • 1800 new renders
  • 15 new animations
  • 37 new unlockable gallery images
  • 4 new unlockable replay scenes
  • 20,000 words
  • 100 new SFX, songs and ambiences

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 个人感觉这游戏比新生也疯狂好玩，无论是建模还是剧情，仅次于我的大学生活，但是就更新有点慢，本来是要等作者更新，再出这个游戏的汉化的，可惜一眼望不到头，行吧，这游戏代码逻辑…怎么说呢？有点反人类，作者是舒服了，我去找文本源码可就惨咯，难怪这游戏没人搞…

item.title: Clown Squad 哥谭市
item.description:
Clown Squad [Prologue] [NoGlory]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The world loves lies — as long as theyâre funny, pretty, or heroic. You were never meant to be honest. You were meant to be a clown. A performer. A distraction. A joke. But thereâs a problem. You physically cannot lie. Jokes are built on exaggeration, nonsense, and falsehood. Comedy is a craft of bending the truth. And you? Youâre forced to tell it exactly as it is. Youâre cynical to your core. You think too sharply. You work harder than anyone around you. Your mind is a razor. And because of it — people treat you worse than someone who has nothing at all. This is a story about a man forced to be funny in a world that hates the truth. And now, for the first time, you get to decide: Will you break or will you break the world?​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Prologue
  • 发行日期：2025-12-09

  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-07
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。

item.title: Milfheim: The Twisted 熟女之乡
item.description:
Milfheim: The Twisted [v0.3] [Bittersweet3D]

Overview

剧情概要
  • For unknown reasons, Damian (MC) was placed in an orphanage. After spending his teenage years in foster care, he becomes a college student and returns to his hometown, Milfheim, for the first vacation of his university life.
剧情概要
  • He takes up lodging in a house owned by Helen (Heroine), planning to spend the break meeting friends and new people. But the more time Damian spends under the same roof with Helen, the more he begins to notice another face hidden behind her warm smile.
  • Milfheim, his hometown, is a beautiful city—not too big, not too small. Y et Damian starts to uncover dark corners he never noticed as a child, plunging him into confusion. He soon realizes that many of the people who shaped his early years are tangled together in a complex web…
  • Why does Helen grow uneasy whenever the past is brought up? What truths has his foster mother never spoken? And the women around Damian—what are your real feelings?
  • Desire, love, maternal instincts, friendship, envy, jealousy, anger, sorrow… A storm of emotions crashes into Damian, just as he steps into adulthood, pulling him deep into Milfheim’s hidden, forbidden secrets.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

item.title: Sunset Rose 暮色玫瑰（阳光玫瑰）
item.description:
Sunset Rose [v0.1 Elite] [Lewdlab]

Overview

剧情概要
  • in the Story you play as a Male Protagonist, He’s a chill guy, mid-twenties, lives alone. No pets, no girlfriend, living that bachelor life. He works at a local fast food style restaurant with his colleague, Daniela. They also happen to be living in the same apartment complex. They are bickering all the time but at least it doesn’t get too boring at work. But one day, everything changes when life takes a bad turn for Daniela and our MC, is gonna be the only one she can rely on to help her. Her apartment burns down in mysterious circumstances and just as she asks MC to crash on his couch for a while, the smoking hot Catalina moves in next door - instantly sparking a connection with MC. Will he make the most of this situation?​

游戏信息

item.title: The Arson Betrayal 纵火背叛
item.description:
The Arson Betrayal [v0.8.0] [Crispy Chicken Productions]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The Arson Betrayal puts you in the shoes of Leo Somerfort (or any name you want). With only an apartment in Ablesmith City and enough cash to pay the bills for a few months, you’ve been working at a café, hoping to save enough money to be able to go to college. But one fateful encounter plunges you into the middle of a conspiracy filled with lies, betrayal, and violence.
  • “Watch your back. Trust no one.”
  • “Now it begins.”
  • Synopsis
剧情概要
  • The Arson Betrayal is first and foremost a Harem game, centered around a story-focused action-thriller visual novel.
  • Players are given the opportunity to choose which girls they wish to pursue a relationship with (or even none at all), as they spiral down towards the center of a deadly conspiracy.
  • As the story goes, you’ll discover the girls’ different kinks and be given the chance to determine how your relationship with them progresses, romantically or otherwise.
  • A majority of your choices and conversations with characters throughout the story are remembered and may affect the story as you go forward.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.8.0 - Act III - Chapter 3
  • 发行日期：2025-12-14

Changelog

更新日志
  • Contains Act II - Chapter 3.
  • 1,863 new images, 20 animations.
  • A revamped gallery.
  • Additional code to support the codex (to be added soon).
  • Several bug fixes, typo corrections, and improvements.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord
  • Twitter

PS
  • 老游戏复活，一流的剧情，二流的建模，三流的渲染，还有下流的我，哈哈。

item.title: Summer Scent 夏日芬芳
item.description:
Summer Scent [v0.6.7Ra Steam] [The Naughty Captain]

Overview

剧情概要
  • It’s the beginning of summer. Jack is 18 years old and has just finished high school by graduating. He has a tense relationship with Eve, his “childhood friend” who seems to have disliked him cordially for a few years. Jack’s parents had left town for a week, Eve invites her best friend, Cassie, to join them. They have the house and the pool for them alone.
  • How Jack will handle the situation depends on you.​

游戏信息

item.title: Apocalypse 2059 启示录2059
item.description:
Apocalypse 2059 [v0.3 Special] [BigH4nd.Inc]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Apocalypse 2059 Welcome to the savage world of 2059, where survival is a daily struggle and civilization is nothing but a distant memory. The World That Was In 2030, an event known as “The Cataclysm” forever changed the face of Earth. Nuclear weapons claimed lives in an instant, plunging the world into a devastating nuclear winter that lasted over a decade. Civilization, law, and morality crumbled into dust. The surface became an inferno, forcing what little plant life remained to retreat underground. For the few who survived, existence became a constant battle against extinction. Twenty years have passed. The pre-war generation grows old, while a new generation rises, knowing nothing of the world that came before.
Spoiler
  • Your Story Begins The story takes place in the year 2059. You, the protagonist, have been living in solitude in a shelter since your birth. These peaceful days are changed by the appearance of a mysterious woman. At her urgent request, you’ll embark on a perilous journey across the savage lands of what was once civilization. Unforgettable Characters Your path will cross with unique survivors, each shaped by the merciless world they inhabit: A reckless and confident villain with her own agenda A young, sensitive tribal leader struggling to protect her people A ruthless warlord carving out her empire silver-tongued treasure hunter seeking fortune in the ruins

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

item.title: Chasing Sunsets 追逐落日
item.description:
Chasing Sunsets [v1.10a] [Stone Fox Studios]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Chasing Sunsets follows the story of step-siblings reconnecting and dealing with the fallout of their parents’ unexpected deaths. As the story progresses, they will cooperate (or compete) with each other to discover the secrets of their parents’ success in business and in love. The player’s choices will determine both how the game ends, and whom he finishes it with. Explore majestic Tonalu Island and the motivations of the tempting ladies encountered along the way…But don’t lose sight of what you’re there for!​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.05.01 15:00 Steam R1：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.05.01 15:00 汉化补丁：优化短信文本不显示汉化的bug ✅
2026.05.03 01:00 汉化补丁：修复章节摘要不显示汉化的bug ✅
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-05-01
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

item.title: Isekai Paradise 异世界天堂
item.description:
Isekai Paradise [v0.8 Patreon] [Soultice]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Just after graduating college, your life wasn’t going so great… No job, no prospects, and then… a truck. Yep, you die in a car accident by a truck-kun. But instead of staying dead, you wake up in Evenralm, a fantasy world full of magic, monsters, and adventures just like manga or anime.
  • With a new lease on life, you’re ready to chase your wildest dream: becoming the Harem King and taking down the Demon Lord! Along the way, you’ll gather a diverse group of amazing women from all corners of Evenralm… Humans, elves, demons, dragons, and more to join you on your lewd adventure.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.8 Patreon
  • 发行日期：2026-04-24

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这次没九龙抱柱，九龙抱柱已经陨落了，用V3模型花费一坤元，0.1-0.7从头到尾跑出来的AI意译，原汁原味，落谦只是七七八八修了一下专有名词，我是一句话都不敢改啊！！！被喷怕了！！！放过孩子吧！！！
  • 0.8没怎么修专有名词，还有集成选项mod，但是这几天会边玩边修。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.04.25 17:00 0.8：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.04.25 17:00 汉化补丁：集成选项mod ✅
2026.04.25 17:00 汉化补丁：小友境月订阅 ✅
2026.04.28 17:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2025-05-02
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

item.title: New Family 新家庭
item.description:
New Family [v0.7.0] [King Peanut]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The story begins with the main character, who lost their parents at a young age, being taken in by a new family. This new family, though not related by blood, is a small, close-knit community that relies on one another. As the main character lives and grows with them, they share in each other’s lives and experiences. The unfolding relationships within this family and the events they encounter together form the central storyline​

item.title: Golden Mean 中庸之道
item.description:

剧情概要
  • After his grandpa dies, a young man finds a demonic horn with magic powers inside of it. But with great power comes great responsibility. And now when the Inquisition is after him, can he keep himself safe while keeping his family together?​
