item.title: Ripples 涟漪
item.description:
Ripples [v0.9.22] [Jestur]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Ripples is a sci-fi visual novel that centers around an 18-year-old in his last year of high school. He reunites with his good friend Darci and sets off to school like any other day, but as the day goes on, he learns new information about his deceased father that has him questioning the truth about his death.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.9.22
  • 发行日期：2026-04-11

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Subscribestar
  • Discord
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 目前来看，涟漪是最经得起推敲的视觉小说了，不愧是借鉴了德剧暗黑，虽然建模是i社的一代HS，但是却是这领域运用最强的。

item.title: The Seven Realms 七界
item.description:
The Seven Realms [R3 v1.03] [SeptCloudGames]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《七界》是一部故事驱动的成人向视觉小说。 你本是一位斯巴达战士，后被转化为吸血鬼王子，踏上了拯救王后的旅途。 这一站你来到了拉菲恩圣地，也就是精灵的家园。那里长期饱受内战蹂躏，如今和平岌岌可危。 你能否救他们于水火之中？

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Realm 3 - 1.04
  • 发行日期：2026-02-01

Changelog

更新日志
  • 834 New Images
  • 9 New Multi-Angle Animations (36 angles)
  • 6 New Trophies
  • 4 New Gallery Entries
  • Added translations for Turkish and Brazilian Portuguese.translated and updated in due course.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Steam
  • Discord
  • SubscribeStar
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 抛开剧情，建模不谈，这部作品的渲染和CG绝对是3D区的顶尖水平，甚至新生也疯狂在其面前都稍逊一筹。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.04.19 19:00 Realm 3 - 1.04：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.04.19 19:00 汉化补丁：集成选项mod、作弊mod ✅
2026.04.19 19:00 汉化补丁：小友境订阅 ✅
2026.04.22 19:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-04-19
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: My Cute Roommate 我的可爱表姐
item.description:
My Cute Roommate [v1.6.1 Ex Beta] [Astaros3D]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Your high school years are over, and now it’s time to think about the future. You need to pick a good college, find yourself a girlfriend, and start thinking about a job. That’s when your life changes; you’re diagnosed with a mysterious illness and there’s only one way to cure it.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：1.6.1 Extra Version Beta
  • 发行日期：2020-03-22

Changelog

更新日志
  • Added the ability to beat Dick at the end of the game.
  • Added translations.
  • Added scene replayer.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Steam
  • Discord
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏很经典，建模没有政治正确，虽然是物理眨眼补帧数的伪动态CG，但不得不说玩法很多，而且背景还是挺温馨的，背景音乐响起，梦回当年熬夜啃生肉的日子了，哈哈。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.04.24 18:00 1.6.1 Extra Version Beta : AI意译汉化补丁补链 ✅
2026.04.24 18:00 1.6.1 Extra Version Beta : 主体APK补链 ✅
2026.04.24 18:00 1.6.1 Extra Version Beta : 画廊mod补链 ✅
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-02-27
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。

item.title: Futa's World of NTR 我是吕子乔
item.description:
Futa’s World of NTR [v1.5.1] [ScarletGames]

Overview

剧情概要
  • After ten long years of protecting her foster family from her little secret, a young futanari finally takes off her chastity belt upon entering high school, eager to explore her repressed degeneracy and satisfy all of her immoralities.
  • Surrounded by sluts and innocents alike, she finds herself in an ever so sweet paradox of non-ending depravity and ntr.
  • The plowing starts from Day 1!

item.title: Cybernetic Seduction 赛博情迷（特工猎艳记）
item.description:
Cybernetic Seduction [Ep.8 P2] [1Thousand]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Cybernetic Seduction 是一款充满性、幽默与动作的选择驱动型未来成人视觉小说。作为一名新手特工，你将在一个全新的世界中展开冒险，只有一个明确的目标：勾引女人。打动黑帮老大，策划抢劫行动，并揭开神秘组织的真相。

item.title: Getting Intimate 亲密无间
item.description:
Getting Intimate [Ch.2 Part C] [MangoWorks]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A young man makes efforts to get into college and fulfill the promise he made many years ago. However, in the same year as the entrance exam, a sudden and tragic event leads him down a different path. Four years later, having lost everything, he receives the opportunity to rebuild his life. In this familiar yet new place, he will meet different people who will have an impact on his life while more than one secret awaits to be revealed.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Chapter 2 - Part C
  • 发行日期：2026-02-07

Changelog

更新日志
  • +1400 renders!
  • 26 animations (2 new scenes, 1200 frames in total)
  • Fresh music tracks!
  • The conclusion of Chapter 2…

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • SubscribeStar
  • Discord
  • Twitter
  • Itch.io

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这建模，这渲染，不玩白瞎！！！
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.04.17 10:00 Chapter 2 - Part C：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.04.17 10:00 汉化补丁：集成选项mod ✅
2026.04.17 10:00 汉化补丁：小友境订阅 ✅

2026.04.20 10:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-04-17
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

item.title: Life in Santa County 圣塔县的生活
item.description:
Life in Santa County [S1 v1.1] [Bold Bash Studios]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 在 LISC 里，你突然变成了你所珍视的人群中的“领头者”——不管你是否做好准备！你身边有五位火辣的女性同住，个个都不是省油的灯；还有那些财大气粗的对手随时盯着你，想找机会打压你。再加上潜藏在暗处的各种秘密，你只能手忙脚乱地应对！准备好迎接爆笑又暖心的剧情，以及让人脸红心跳的激情场面吧！

item.title: Life's Payback 生命的回报
item.description:
Life’s Payback [v2.4] [Vinkawa]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Life’s Payback is a game where you take your revenge on life. Everything was going well until an unprecedented economic crisis turned your daily routine upside down. You were living on your own but had to return to the family home against your will to excel at school, which is now the condition for your family to receive financial aid from the government. However, given the way you’ve been treated in the past, you decide that everything comes at a price…

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

item.title: Origin Story 起源故事（嘿炮纠插队）
item.description:
Origin Story [S2 v0.9.3] [JDOR]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Taking place twenty years after the Metagen-92 virus – aka the “Superflu” – has swept the world and rendered many of its adult population superpowered or mutated, Origin Story follows MC (name customizable), a seemingly normal nineteen-year-old who in any other universe would be a popular and attractive prospect for most girls. But in this universe, his ability hasn’t manifested yet. Shunned by most of his meta-gifted peers, MC finds himself a hapless virgin on the lower rung of his school’s social ladder, with only a few misfit friends by his side.
Spoiler
  • Following the death of his parents when he was just a baby, his upbringing in the system was overseen and financially supported by their close friend Parker Samson, the affluent and influential co-owner of the lead organization behind Metagen research and development of the now ineffective Metagen Vaccine. Having recently moved in with the beautiful Parker, and her equally beautiful daughter Riley, MC finds the perpetual state of arousal that comes with the burden of his virginity even more challenging.
  • When MC is targeted and violently attacked for reasons unknown to him, The Sisterhood – a government-backed team of celebrity superheroines and sex icons - comes to his aid. While under their care, The Sisterhood immediately recognize his worth and hidden charms.
  • MC soon finds himself juggling his school life, his suddenly blossoming relationships with the women he keeps close, his curious involvement with The Sisterhood and one big secret that could determine whether this is the origin story of a hero, or a villain.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

item.title: Industry Baby 工业宝贝
item.description:
Industry Baby [v0.3] [Ekko]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Your life is what you make it. Make it the best it can be. Fucking girls for a living? Sounds fun, ain’t it …?
  • You graduated Summa Cum Laude from college, expecting to be the top employee at any company. But, as fate would have it, you couldn’t find a job at all. Facing the high cost of living, you finally swallow your pride and decide to enter the adult industry to make a living. Will you ever reach the top again, like in the old days?
  • Climb your way to the top of the porn industry a welcome to the Industry Baby.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说

item.title: Between Humanity 人类之间
item.description:
Between Humanity [v0.3.3] [DebatingPanda]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Between Humanity takes you on a journey into a potential future that borders on dystopia. Set just five years ahead, you, as the protagonist, were just an ordinary student until one day you find yourself waking up in a hospital room.
  • All memories of why you ended up there are blurred in the depths of your mind. But as soon as you try to go back to your daily life, you realize that something is fundamentally different. You are invited to live in your best friend’s house, where you will also be sharing the space with her mother and sister, each of whom has their own set of problems and daily struggles. What could possibly go wrong with that?
  • With every decision you make, you not only change your own life but also that of your friends and loved ones. It’s in your hands which game you want to play.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说

item.title: Being a DIK 我的大学生活
item.description:
Being a DIK [v0.8.3] [DrPinkCake]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Being a DIK is a choice-driven adult Visual Novel focusing on the fun parts of college life. The game is packed with humor, sex, romance, drama and a rich story. Play as a young male attending college at B&R and guide him through the experience.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说

  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3

  • 制作日期：2026-04-10
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Ms.Denvers 丹弗斯女士（毕加索女士）
item.description:
Ms.Denvers [v0.1.2.6] [Pop Toc]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Wanda Denvers is a 40-year-old single mother with a son and two daughters. She’s the principal of Middleton High School. This story focuses on her life after 5 years of divorce, as she battles with the task of having to take care of 3 people on her own. It’s now been so long since she had a love life she feels more lonely than ever before. How will she fill the pit of emptiness in her life? You decide.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio

item.title: Realm Invader 领域入侵者
item.description:
Realm Invader [Ep.2 P2] [Invader Gary]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In this game, you follow a young soulless shell for you to self-insert into man who lives in a world very similar to yours. Recently, he’s been riddled with several mysterious ailments, including headaches, goosebumps, and an inexplicable sense of dread.
  • These symptoms were a warning, this man finds himself in the middle of a cataclysmic event, at least, it would seem so. Where cataclysms will typically lead to the destruction of a world, this one has led to a birth. The nature of his world has shifted around him. There are new species, an altered society, and magic.
  • He needs to learn about his new circumstances and what he can do with his new magical abilities. This man will slowly come to realize why he was sent to this world and walks a journey to unravel the mystery of his existence.
  • …
  • …
  • …
  • …
  • Oh, yeah, and he fucks a bunch of people on the way.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode 2 - Part 2
  • 发行日期：2025-08-01

Changelog

更新日志

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 顶级CG，顶级动画，搞笑文风，大大滴推荐。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.04.10 06:00 Episode 2 - Part 2：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.04.10 06:00 汉化补丁：修复有些文本不显示汉化的bug ✅
2026.04.10 06:00 汉化补丁：优化选项mod，设置右上角可以关闭和开启 ✅
2026.04.10 06:00 汉化补丁：小友境月订阅 ✅
2026.04.13 06:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-04-10
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

item.title: Steps of Debauchery 堕落之路
item.description:
Steps of Debauchery [Ep.5.1] [Fooxied]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Follow the steps of Riley, a girl who moves from a small town to the city to help her husband, Mike, pursue his dreams. While Mike is busy with his bar, Riley supports him wholeheartedly and often puts others’ well-being above her own. This leads her into unexpected situations, where she discovers more about her true self and deepest desires.
  • She explores her sexuality in college and unravels her fantasies, takes on the role of a waitress at the bar, engages in activities with an elderly neighbor, streams adventures with his grandson and that’s just the tip of the mountain. Riley’s world is opening wide in front of her, and she waits for you to explore it.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 发行日期：2026-04-12

  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-04-08
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。

item.title: University of Problems 学院情缘
item.description:
University of Problems [v1.8.5 Extended] [DreamNow]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Student life is perhaps the most vivid, colorful, and memorable period of life for many of us. You start your adult life, feel unlimited possibilities, make a lot of new acquaintances. “University of Problems” is just about it. An ordinary guy from an ordinary family unexpectedly enters one of the best universities in the country. What could be better, right? Lots of opportunities, constant parties, attractive girls, complete freedom of choice. In a word: real adult life. But everything is not as rosy as it may seem at first glance…​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

item.title: Confined and Horny 禁足中的欲火
item.description:
Confined and Horny [v0.26] [Tukann]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Confined and Horny is an immersive sandbox adult game with compelling story elements. Fully animated sex scenes, hours of sandbox fun with lewdness around every corner, and a lot more content to come.
  • As you’re moving to an apartment share in a new city, the government decides to confine every citizen to their home. You’re now stuck with your new roommates. Develop your relationships, unravel their stories… and get intimate with them.​

item.title: Imperial Chronicles 帝国编年史
item.description:
Imperial Chronicles [v0.13] [Lazy Monkey]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The young prince has been in exile since childhood. Unexpectedly, he gets the opportunity to return to his home. But there will be many dangers on his way, because the closer you are to the crown, the more rivals and enemies you have.

  • 但是有些小瑕疵，就是作者改了前面一些文本，所以汉化补丁不显示中文了，因为没有对应的文本

  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3

  • 制作日期：2026-04-04
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: A.O.A. Academy AOA学院
item.description:
A.O.A. Academy [Ch.5 Gold] [TLGGAMES]

Overview

剧情概要
  • June 2020, the month after your father died. He was the only motivation for you to stay in the old town. Now.. You didn’t know where else to go or what else to do. Due to his bad heart, you decided to take care of him full time, causing you to drop out of high-school to focus on the farm.
Spoiler
  • There’s absolutely nothing else left for you here… Until one day, you found a letter from the A.O.A academy, claiming that you have been accepted into their academy. This surprised you, since you’ve never attempted to enroll in any academy. Not only that, this letter also contained the number of your old friend, Ashley. Determine to face your new future , you headed to the A.O.A Academy.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Chapter 5 Gold
  • 发行日期：2022-05-15

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Instagram

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏很可惜，半路夭折了，24年的时候跑过AI，只不过是gpt的，质量不如deepseek，所以前阵子又跑了一次AI，只是一直搁置吃灰，刚好昨天有水友推了，那么就制作一下补丁吧
  • 原游戏是没有CG回放的，补丁虽然集成了外置画廊，但是画廊只能看一半，一半放生了，甚至一半都没有，这我也没办法，直接打在本体，就得重新跑一次ai，太麻烦了，虽然这游戏已经寄了。

item.title: Fog of War 战争迷雾
item.description:
Fog of War [v0.5.1] [Story Machine Studios]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Rex Richards, born with an enhanced eidetic memory and a natural born soldier becomes the youngest to ever make Delta Force. Aka “The Unit”. After feeling like he is losing his humanity on the battlefield he retires. Rex uses his sciences degree he obtained while serving to attend R. Winters Medical University, where he tries to escape his clandestine operator past. Will Rex find solace on his new chosen path or become the monster he fears? Sometimes walking away does not mean you escape without a fight.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: I Was a Teenage Vampire Rebuild 我是少年吸血鬼
item.description:
I Was a Teenage Vampire Rebuild [v0.8.1b] [FatalMasterpiece]

Overview

剧情概要
  • It’s summer, 1989. Class is almost out, and your last chance to make memories is slipping away. You’ve got plans: get a job, buy a car, maybe even find a girlfriend. But something’s wrong in Silver Lake. People are disappearing. Shadows move where they shouldn’t. And when your friend goes missing, the mystery hits home. Something in the darkness is waiting for you. Something old. This summer, growing up might just get you killed.
Spoiler
  • I Was a Teenage Vampire is a story driven visual novel inspired by retro adventure games, 80s horror flicks, and teen sex comedies of the 1980s. Set in smalltown America during the final days of class, you’ll navigate friendships, romances, and the strange forces awakening beneath the surface of Silver Lake. With branching paths, player choice, and characters who remember how you treat them, your actions shape the story and its outcome. This version has been completely rebuilt in Ren’Py.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Murmur 低语
item.description:
Murmur [v0.7 Hotfix] [Devil’s Dad]

Overview

剧情概要
  • It is a story about love and lust in our lives, about what their absence leads to and what forms they can take. In this game, you’ll be playing as a 29-year-old guy who gets involved in unexpected mystical events. His life gets turned on its head and he has to survive in the new world he’s found himself in. But it’s not as grim as it seems at first glance. As you play, you’ll meet girls who need you just like you need them. Will you make them yours, seduce them, or cherish and love them? It’s up to you. Each of them has their own background, character, and hidden fetishes…​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.7 Public Hotfix
  • 发行日期：2025-05-15

Changelog

更新日志
  • Fixed the error message that appeared while telling Sophie the truth If you experience an error on launch with “File “game/definitions.rpy”, line 180” - Please redownload the game
  • New content: story continuation after the date with Yui
  • New UI design: main menu, load\save menu, settings, new music credits, updated gallery, dialogue window, choice menu and love menu with girls points
  • New visual notifications for love\lewd points and other info
  • New section called “Other” for the gallery, and new wallpapers and arts in corresponding sections
  • Love menu now contains “events” that had place in your playthrough, but for old save not all previous events will be displayed, it’s not critical, but if you want to see all “events” listed there you’ll need to start new game
  • Save\load pages now remember your scroll position, just as gallery will remember what page you were on
  • Bug and other fixes

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 很纯很暧昧，这游戏玩下来很甜，尤其结衣甜得犯规，而且文风很舒服，男主人设也三观在线，没粗话，没damn，情商很高，总得来说，作者文笔很强，不尬，设定也好，目前在我这里排第四，虽然女主有种日漫番剧倒贴的既视感，嗯，没错，就是成人版的五等分的花嫁，但是我就好这一口，我玩完futa，ntl，女性堕落，再来一把这个，简直太带派了。
博文更新日志

  • 制作日期：2026-03-30
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: The Beach House 海滨别墅
item.description:

Overview

剧情概要
  • You play as a 20-year-old young man living a quiet, simple life in a small coastal town. But soon one unexpected event is going to change your entire life. What awaits you is a new beginning with beautiful women, tempting choices, and thrilling adventures.​

item.title: Waifu Academy 二次元老婆学院
item.description:
Waifu Academy [v0.13.5] [Irphaeus]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In Waifu Academy, you play as young man (with a name of your choice, of course), who wishes to seek revenge after many years of harrowing ordeals… The game features more than 30 characters, each of which is unique and has a (hopefully) believable background. Most of the game scenes take place at a fictional private high school called, ‘Sazaki Academy.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.13.5
  • 发行日期：2025-11-29

Changelog

更新日志
  • Fixed and updated the Gallery.
  • New optional Kayane look.
  • New place the Devil’s Kiss aka Tendo Club.
  • Added Karma choices following previous events.
  • Added ~3800 lines of dialogue and script.
  • Added 9 new scenes with
  • 300 3D renders. -Added 26 new animations scenes.
  • Added 3 new musics, and 12 sounds/FX.
  • Fixed many typos.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 真真正正的神作，作者特别有日式二次元的梗，男主智商在线，不尬。
博文更新日志

item.title: Sinful Summer 夏日小故事
item.description:
Sinful Summer: A Tale of Forbidden Love [Ch.3.5] [Ruykiru]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Embark on an unforgettable journey with Erik and Lyna, two young twins entangled in a passionate web of desires. Set against the breathtaking backdrop of a private tropical island villa, their reunion after a year abroad sparks a fiery exploration of emotions that defy traditional boundaries.
  • As they tread the line between repressed feelings and mutual attraction, their bond deepens and the craving for the forbidden becomes impossible to ignore. With the arrival of their mother Helga on the horizon, will they succumb to temptation or resist the call of their primal urges? Discover the twists and turns of this compelling narrative through a kinetic visual novel where love, family, and desire intertwine in very interesting ways…
  • DISCLAIMER: THIS IS NOT A GAME, IT’S A VISUAL NOVEL WITHOUT CHOICES.
  • Think of it as a book, TV show or movie, but with lots of porn. Also this is NOT your usual incest story about a mindless poorly-written harem. It has a big focus on the taboo itself and making the family relationships mean something more than just a label. Expect very heavy incestuous dialogue here, without any stupid censorship patches. Also lesbian scenes and both male and female protags.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 发行日期：2026-02-15

  • Discord

  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Race of Life 绝命竞速
item.description:
Race of Life [Act 2 Ep.4 Fix 4] [Underground Studio]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《Race of Life》是一部成人视觉小说。你扮演杰克·米勒（Jake Miller），一位离婚的教授，他因过去的错误失去了高薪工作和婚姻，开始从事教学工作。当悲剧降临时，杰克必须运用他的所有技能、智慧和冷酷无情来拯救他最爱的人。

item.title: Zenless Zeal Zones 绝区零同人
item.description:
Futa’s World of NTR [v1.5.1] [ScarletGames]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The day Babmu opened the door to his own life, the city began to play a new tune. Gentle coincidences, bold conversations, and quiet support will turn the calculating Vaiz into someone ready to accept love in many faces.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

版本信息

  • 发行日期：2026-02-08

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Discord
  • Boosty

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 之前一时兴起跑的AI，绝区人同人来着，没啥剧情，挺短的，但是可以看看女角色上垒。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-28
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
博文更新日志
  • 2026.03.28 24:00
    • 更新0.02的AI意译汉化补丁
    • 很短的剧情，就不添加月订阅了

游戏预览图

荤图

DOWNLOAD（汉化补丁）

Win/Linux（PC端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • 英文原版：VIKINGFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：PIXELDRAIN

  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁

  • 将汉化补丁rpa文件放入game文件夹中
  • 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可

item.title: Growing Things Up 金鸡独立
item.description:
Growing Things Up [S1 v1.04] [Kinkbr]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 一部关于欲望、信任以及我们甚至试图向自己隐瞒的秘密的成人视觉小说。在 South Lake，每一个选择都会揭示伤疤、无声的操纵以及那些让你更接近或更远离真实自我的道路。

  • 有需要的水友可以自行打补丁，PC和iOS直接丢到game文件夹即可，但是安卓呢？也能打补丁，只不过需要移动文件，其实就是外挂移植的安卓，在博客顺便找一篇这样的博文，下载主体apk就行了，例如老婆学院，康乃馨俱乐部，AI革命等等。

item.title: MILF Secrets 熟不可言
item.description:
MILF Secrets [v0.1] [Astaros 3D]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A new place. New people. Something feels off… but you can’t quite explain why. This v0.1 introduces the world, the tension, and the first steps into the story.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

版本信息

Changelog

更新日志

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Twitter
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 可爱表姐作者的新作，看着可还行。
博文更新日志
  • 2026.03.22 18:00
    • 更新0.1的AI意译汉化补丁
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-22
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Reclaiming the Lost 寻回失落
item.description:
Reclaiming the Lost [v0.12] [Passion Portal]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《寻回失落》是一款由选择驱动的成人视觉小说，你将跟随一名男子，他发现自己的旧爱将他们的孩子送去领养。为了弥补过错，他开始寻找失散的孩子。途中，他遇到了一位神秘的女孩，二人共同揭开真相。

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.12
  • 发行日期：2026-03-07

Changelog

更新日志
  • This update is packed with events for almost every main girl — Emily, Chloe, Grace, Evelyn, and even a character you haven’t seen in a long time.
  • Emily – 3 Events
  • A full working day with Emily
  • A scene at your place with Emily and Chloe
  • A surprise ending featuring a character who hasn’t appeared in a while Chloe – 2 Events
  • A second date for those following the “Mysterious Politician” route Grace – 1 Event
  • A rare opportunity to spend time with Grace Evelyn – 2 Events
  • The beautiful wife of your best friend returns And this time your friendship might be put to the test again…

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Steam
  • Subscribestar

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这次落谦移植了个安卓，也附上的AI意译汉化补丁，当然，看各位水友的需要，因为这游戏是有官中，不过也是AI测试版本，看了下，应该是gpt的，比某些所谓的精翻强，不过原文人名是显示英文的，看着有点别扭，所以我自己跑了一个ai。

item.title: The Veil 帷幕
item.description:
The Veil [v0.3.6] [Mr.Shaxy]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You transfer to a university for your sophomore year to start life with a clean slate. A new city, new people, new - - opportunities—it seems like everything is falling into place perfectly.
  • But already in the first week, something starts to go wrong.
  • Strangers stare at you too intently.
  • Conversations overheard by chance, cut short when you approach.
  • Suspicious documents that shouldn’t exist.
  • This university has dark secrets. Some students know more than they let on. Teachers pretend not to notice anything. And those who ask too many questions… disappear.
  • Someone is watching you.
  • Someone is manipulating events.
  • Someone has already decided your fate.
  • Can you get to the bottom of the truth? And most importantly, will you still be alive when you find out?

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.3.6
  • 发行日期：2026-03-04

Changelog

更新日志

  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-17
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。

item.title: Agent17 特工17
item.description:
Agent17 [v0.26.10] [HEXATAIL]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You are an ordinary-looking pervert with average grades, blending into the background at school without anyone paying much attention to you. Occasionally, you may face bullying from troublemakers, possibly even being robbed or coerced into doing their bidding. However, one fateful day while heading home, you stumble upon a damaged phone. The phone initiated transformation in your life.
Spoiler: More

  • This phone has the power to solve all your problems. Contrary to popular belief, an unknown individual called Agent17 obeys the commands of whoever picks up the phone, allowing you to instruct her to carry out any task. Suddenly, your life takes a dramatic turn for the better. You triumph over the bullies who tormented you, and you exact revenge on the teachers and principals who held you in contempt.

  • The mundane school life that once held no interest for you begins to change as you start interacting with a multitude of talented and captivating individuals. As your connections deepen, you gradually uncover their hidden secrets. With the formidable abilities of Agent17 at your disposal, you also delve into their unknown mysteries. Moreover, you realize that your life is brimming with countless fascinating discoveries awaiting your exploration.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Contagion Crisis 传染危机
item.description:
Contagion Crisis [v0.6.0] [WeLoveMonsters]

Overview

剧情概要

  • Contagion Crisis is an adult monster survival-horror kinetic novel heavily influenced by games such as Resident Evil, Parasite Eve, and more.

  • In 2018, a contagion escapes into the city of Grimhaven, Washington, turning everything it touches into lust-fueled monsters. Sisters, Sarah and Ava, must traverse the city, doing their best to avoid the mutations as they attempt to reach sanctuary. Through their journey, the pair will seek the truth of the contagion’s outbreak; a task that will require them to unravel a web of lies that will change them both forever.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

item.description:
Photo Hunt [v0.20.2 Extra] [Moochie]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The story is happening around your character, who was unwilingly sent to his mother house. The city you have known before is now like different - so much has changed. Above all, after just one mistake you lost your siblings trust. No money, no love, only your new camera and desire to turn things upside down…

游戏信息

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • ……
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-01
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 打开Spark模拟器导入英文原版压缩包文件，不用解压，不用解压，不用解压，重要的事情说三遍
  • 然后将汉化补丁rpa文件移动到以下路径： 
    1

    我的iPhone/Spark/games/PhotoHunt/game
  • 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可
  • PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。
  1. 温馨提示：

item.description:

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《极品采花郎》是一款中国古风恋爱模拟游戏。玩家透过情节的发展，在游戏中逐步与各色美女培养感情，进而渐渐发展出愈来愈深入的亲密关系。过程中，可进行采集、制作、建造、种植、锻炼等行为推进游戏进程；更有特色玩法“調教”可与美女互动。

item.title: Phoenixes 凤凰
item.description:
Phoenixes [v16.0.0] [NoMeme]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The story of PHOENIXES takes place in a world where both magic and science are well developed, a world where the superhero is really a thing. You, a wanderer in the junction between light and shadow, are now dragged into the cusp of the fight between heroes and villains. The city is falling apart and justice is being corrupted, you will have to take the responsibility and … … … …
  • Nah, that sounds boring, why don’t you just enjoy an easy life in this urban fantasy world and get all the hot strong beauties in your harem no matter whether they are heroes or villains? That solves the fight too, right?​

item.title: Fleeting Memories 流连忆往昔
item.description:
Fleeting Memories [v0.4.6] [Lyrical Artistry]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Get ready for a romantic noir journey, as you take on the role of a private detective living with your childhood sweetheart, aka best friend. One day, when your newest neighbor comes to you with a personal request, you’re quickly thrust into your next case. The past and present unravels as you try to crack the unsolved mystery of her sister’s death. Not to mention, the possibility of a new romance as well. Will you keep things strictly professional? Or is there room for some new love in your life? What about your childhood friend? Follow your instincts and witness where this thrilling journey takes you.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Update 4 Final (0.4.6)
  • 发行日期：2026-02-10

Changelog

更新日志
  • 5500+ new words of content
  • 100+ static renders
  • 7 new animations
  • New music and sound effects
  • Translated in Korean, Chinese and Russian

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这次更新作者添加了简体中文，不过是ai，但是总比没有好，流连忆往昔这名字挺有诗意的，建模还行吧，勉强能看，渲染就有点，总觉得有一层雾，但是动态CG顶，肉眼可见，作者花了很大的心思，到时候我有空再跑一下ai吧，现在能玩就将就着玩吧，总比没有好，哈哈。

item.description:

Overview

剧情概要
  • Upon your grandfather’s sudden departure from this world you inherit a certain island resort, and it turns out to be a secret organization……!
  • Girls with “special circumstances” are brought here from all over the world.
  • Having become the “executioner” of this resort, you will receive various tasks, and dish out punishment. Whether you can subjugate the girls through your discipline is up to you!

item.description:
Secret Flasher Sereka [V1.3] [SheableSoft]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Experience the greatest dilemma known to humans: wanting to experience the thrill of exposing yourself in extreme ways, but the more extreme it is,the more likely you are to be caught. Seleka starts out as an amateur exhibitionist, but will hopefully become a legendary flasher who has been seen by all.
  • Complete missions to unlock new maps, learn slutty actions, and earn points to buy daring accessories. The more daring you are exposing yourself, the more points you will earn.
  • But be careful! If you are caught, you will forfeit all the points you have earned in your current session! Experience the risk a real exhibitionist faces(minus the jail time and sex offender registry)!

item.title: Summer Crush 夏日恋情
item.description:
Summer Crush [Ep.8 v1.0.3] [Wet n’ Juicy Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《夏日恋情》是一部面向成年人的视觉小说。故事情节将完全取决于你做出的选择。你将扮演一个青年，一个已经计划好他的乏味成年生活的青年。现在，他正在等待夏天的结尾。可能会出现什么转机呢？

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode 8 - 1.03
  • 发行日期：2026-02-07

Changelog

更新日志
  • The eighth and final episode of Summer Crush is now available. New scenes, animations, achievements, and music await you. Well, business as usual!
  • I realize I’ve been dragging my feet. In May 2025, when I sat down to develop the final episode, I thought I’d have it all finished in time for the game’s third anniversary, November 25th. And now, on November 24th, I’m looking at the game’s progress and realizing there’s still a ton of work to do: the animations aren’t ready, some renders aren’t finished, the music is missing, and there’s no sign of any translations into other languages. This post is partly for myself – if you’re the only one responsible for everything, don’t set deadlines! You’ll never make it…
  • Nevertheless, I apologize. The game was supposed to be finished sooner, but I couldn’t do it before. But now it’s done!
  • I hope you enjoy it. Thank you for devoting your precious time to my little game.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Steam
  • Discord

  • 还行，水友推荐的。

item.title: Cross Realms 跨界
item.description:
Cross Realms [v0.4Public] [DuskDuck]

Overview

剧情概要
  • On the first day of your college life, you and a group of friends are sucked into a vortex. When you wake up, you realize you’re in a foreign place - this is not Earth. As you explore this new world, you discover it’s a Qi cultivation realm, where power determines everything.
Spoiler

  • There are nine Realms, each controlled by a dominant race: Humans, Demons, Deities, Spiritual Beasts, and more. Each Realm has a “spring” - a flow of Qi energy harvested from the Void, the space between Realms. Because of these springs, peace between the Realms is fragile and rarely lasts long. You arrive during the longest period of peace ever known, but how long will this so-called ‘peace’ really last?

  • As your journey continues, you uncover more secrets about these Realms. Someone in the shadows has been plotting and orchestrating your arrival. Will you be able to stand up for yourself in a world where many see you as nothing more than a useless ant?

  • The answer are yours to find.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Eternum 永恒世界
item.description:
Eternum [v0.9.5 Public] [Caribdis]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You’re moving with your best friend to the city of Kredon, home to some of the best schools and universities in the country, to continue your studies. However, in Kredon, there’s only one thing everyone talks about: ETERNUM—the virtual, hyper-reality MMORPG game released a few years ago that revolutionized the world of technology.
Spoiler
  • With a neural implant that recreates the five senses, it becomes impossible to distinguish between the game and the real world. Thousands of servers form the network of Eternum: from colorful, magic-filled fantasy worlds to foggy sci-fi cities, no world is beyond reach. Nevertheless, looking beyond the surface, there’s a darker side to this pretty facade: black markets, torture, rape, illegal content trafficking, unlawful assemblies, data theft… Eternum follows the rules of no man. For some reason, governments turn a blind eye to this; there’s no regulation and no control. Some say it’s because the game is highly addictive, some say it’s because the market moves millions of dollars daily, some say those in power have been bribed, and others say… there’s something else going on. And you? What’s your role in this story? Well… That’s up to you now.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.9.5 Public
  • 发行日期：2026-01-21

Changelog

更新日志
  • 2050+ new images
  • 90+ new animations
  • 20900+ new lines of code
  • 42+ new music tracks
  • 100+ new sound effects
  • Several render and code fixes

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord
  • SubscribeStar
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 安卓是用作者的apk文件，作者集成在压缩包里，还是和之前一样的移动文件，当然也可以用官网itch的汉化，我就懒得搬运了，就上传我自己玩的汉化上来。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-02-09
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

游戏预览图

素图

荤图

DOWNLOAD（汉化补丁）

Win/Linux（PC端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：VIKINGFILE
  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：VIKINGFILE
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将汉化补丁rpa文件放入game文件夹中
  • 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可
  1. 温馨提示：
  • 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒
  • 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程
  • 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电
  • 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！

Android（安卓端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：VIKINGFILE
  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：VIKINGFILE
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 安装APK文件
  • 启动游戏，放行所有权限
  • 这时游戏会闪退，如果没有闪退，就自己手动大退
  • 将压缩包中的rpa文件和汉化补丁rpa文件一起移动到以下路径： 
    1

    Documents/RenPy_Saves/com.caribdis.Eternum/game
  • 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可
  • PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。
  1. 温馨提示：
  • 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒
  • 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程

  • 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！

iOS（苹果端）

  1. 环境配置：
  • 苹果端需使用Spark模拟器进行游玩
  • Spark模拟器AppStore有售
  1. 下载链接：

  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：VIKINGFILE
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 打开Spark模拟器导入英文原版压缩包文件，不用解压，不用解压，不用解压，重要的事情说三遍
  • 然后将汉化补丁rpa文件移动到以下路径： 
    1

    我的iPhone/Spark/games/Eternum/game
  • 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可
  • PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。

  1. 下载链接：
  • 游戏存档：VIKINGFILE
  • 画廊Mod：GOFILE
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载游戏存档或画廊Mod
  • 画廊Mod：将解压出的文件放入game文件夹中即可
  • 游戏存档：将解压出的saves文件夹直接覆盖/替换game目录下的同名文件夹

item.title: My Hentai Fantasy 我的hentai幻想
item.description:
My Hentai Fantasy [v0.14.0] [Naughty Capy]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You just wake up without remembering anything, apparently, you’re living a dream life, but why does everything seem so odd? You are about to go to university and your father is one of the richest men alive, but the fact that you don’t remember anything after waking up makes you very uneasy, so you try to find answers.
  • But who knows, maybe the answers you’re looking for are not worth it… Or are they? I guess it’s better if you find out for yourself.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.14.0
  • 发行日期：2026-02-06

Changelog

更新日志
  • FINALLY, THE END OF TATSUMAKI’S ROUTE. This update includes events that you may never see unless you pick the right choices. It also has more renders and more animations than the first part, so you may need to play it twice to experience everything and unlock both endings. Just remember: the ending you choose will heavily affect the main story.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Twitter
  • Discord

item.title: Desert Stalker 沙漠追猎者
item.description:
Desert Stalker [v0.20.0 Beta] [Zetan]

Overview

游戏概述
  • Desert Stalker puts you in control of a seasoned antiquity scavenger, a man whose main objective is finding rare objects in the ruins of civilization. When you uncover an artifact capable of not only informing the past but also shaping the future, everything changes. Make major decisions about how you interact with the world around you, enter into erotic relationships, and live with the consequences of either dominating or saving both the people and landscape of post-apocalyptic Egypt.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.20.0 Beta
  • 发行日期：2026-02-05

Changelog

更新日志
  • Translations:
  • Updated Spanish translation to 0.19 (credits: Darax)
  • Minor changes / Bugfixes:
  • Fixed an issue where the cutscene with Shani & Reyna would stall while having the dialogue in Spanish
  • Fixed an issue with d18g (Krait’s night scene) conditions not being evaluated properly
  • Fixed multiple reported typos and grammatical errors

item.title: New Horizon 新天域
item.description:
New Horizon [v0.4 Early] [KawaiiSukebe]

Overview

剧情概要
  • What does a man have left after his father has gone missing, and his ex-girlfriend relentlessly broke up with him for seemingly no reason at all? An empty heart that lives through a monotonous everyday life. “Meeting you changed my world.” The fateful encounter got our story’s MC, Hirase Tatsuya, involved in something that could shake the whole country, or even the world. Come and unravel the secrets behind the MC’s missing father and all the unexpected bittersweet encounters with the girls.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.4 Early
  • 原版发布日：2026-01-25

Changelog

更新日志
  • 1300~ new renders
  • 23 new animations
  • New music and sfx
  • New story content for Ayase, Miharu, Chika, Kaho.
  • 1 scene with side character Maki.
  • Added option to turn off KS commentary in-game.
  • Everyone’s favorite menu music from 0.1.5 is back

Developer（入正地址）

item.title: Dark Magic 黑魔法
item.description:
Dark Magic [v0.21.0] [F. Lord]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You grew up in an ordinary family with an ordinary life, except for the fact, you’re the only man alive in the world! You’ve been living among beautiful girls in the Kingdom, yet, you still have no real actions with any girls.
  • Then everything changed when you met The Red Witch.
  • The one who will teach you about the magic power.
  • The one who will pull you into the Dark Magic world.
  • All girls in the Kingdom are awaiting you to meet them.
  • Now it’s your chance to corrupt them all!
  • " This game is huge, hard, and really long, so please take your time playing and enjoy! “​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.21.0
  • 发行日期：2026-01-26

Changelog

更新日志
  • Fixed missing Book of Memory pages
  • Reworked Drunk mom scene
  • Reworked Hitomi massage room images
  • Reworked Onsen & Spa images
  • Updated Magic Notes
  • Updated Book of Red (Patron)
  • Added new music and sound effects
  • Added new feature: “Immerse” in Open Book
  • Added Onsen & Spa front door images
  • Added Book of Lover new page: Pamela
  • Added Taka to Room Masturbation
  • Added/Updated Journey (Open Book)
  • Added 6 Christmas journey images
  • Added Love Letter in Portrait for Airi and Momoko
  • Added night conversation with Taka
  • Added morning conversaion with Chizue
  • Added new conversaion with Yamiyo
  • Added new conversaion with Red Witch (1on1)
  • Added new conversaion with Ruriko (1on1)
  • Added new conversaion with Yasuko
  • Added new conversaion with Namie
  • Added new conversaion with Hitomu (Massage Room)
  • Added new conversaion with Hitomi
  • Update Book of Memory:
    • Momoko: +5 Pages
    • Red Witch: +1 Page
    • Taka: +1 Page
    • School: +1 Page
    • Other: +2 Pages

Developer（入正地址）

  • SubscribeStar
  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 我没有玩过这游戏，水友让我跑的汉化，游戏内的任务，词条，我都提取并通过ai意译，可玩性很高。

关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-01-30
  • PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Pale Carnations 康乃馨俱乐部
item.description:
Pale Carnations [Ch.4 Up.6 Public] [Mutt & Jeff]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In Pale Carnations, step into the shoes of a tightly wound pre-med student pulled head first into a world of debauchery thanks to the influence of a waning childhood friend. As the newest employee at the Carnation Club, navigate your part in a series of cruel erotic games and sexual encounters. Will you give into your sadistic urges and be enticed by the club’s wealth and hedonism? Or perhaps at the end of it all, a flower of romance will bud, pushing you to leave the brothel’s sordid business behind.
  • Features a variety of intersecting storylines that sees you guide the performance of three women desperately competing for the brothel’s grand prize, uncover backroom dealings steeped in intrigue, and maneuver the day-to-day social life of a man ill at ease with his basest impulses.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select

item.title: Bloody Anomaly 血腥异常
item.description:
Bloody Anomaly [v0.1] [Dejavu]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The outbreak of the BA26 virus claimed thousands of lives and temporarily wiped out the usual rules. A vaccine with 93% effectiveness restored the illusion of safety, but you were unlucky, one of the 7% for whom it didn’t work… Well… there was no turning back.
  • Rumors spread that some of the infected were exhibiting strange, almost vampiric behavior.
Spoiler: More
  • Journalist Sera wrote: “They could no longer eat regular food. Their manners, habits, appetite… everything changed. I don’t know what was happening to them, but it was terrifying.”
  • And what about you? Once an orphan with nothing in your pocket, you clawed your way to the top, building a chemical empire and becoming a millionaire. Power, money, knowledge, everything was in your hands. Risk and criminal connections had long been part of your life, just like the church you built in the heart of the city, a towering mansion disguised as a place of worship.
  • And while the rumors kept spreading, no one knew what would happen next. The first wave may have been only a test, and the real consequences had yet to appear.
  • If the second stage of the virus begins, everything could change overnight. Oh… the vaccine does not work on you… And then you will have to choose: fight to survive or be consumed by the virus with no chance of recovery.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Unity
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.1
  • 发行日期：2025-12-26

Changelog

更新日志

item.title: Champion of Realms 冠军人生
item.description:
Champion of Realms [v0.104] [Zimon]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 在一个由混乱而生的世界里，古代诸神为了避免世界末日的冲突，将他们的后代分开。他们为每个孩子创造了三个不同的时间维度，并将孩子们生存的关键任务委托给一个人：勇士。
  • 数万年以来，这位冠军一直守护着三维空间。但现在，这位冠军却消失得无影无踪。
  • 尽管主角竭尽全力，他还是被迫参加一场致命的比赛，以决定未来的冠军……以及所有人的命运。他能活下来吗？还是会被命运的重压压垮？
  • 幸运的是，在这场惊险的冒险中，他并不是孤单一人。几位值得信赖、美丽的盟友将与他并肩前行。他们齐心协力，一定能克服最艰难的挑战，体验最美妙的乐趣。
  • 你还在等什么？冒险就在眼前……

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

版本信息

  • Taile outfit
  • Taile interactions redone

  • New fishing companion Izanami
  • New 24 achievements

  • Naming saves
  • New music and sounds
  • Launcher new features

Overview

剧情概要
  • You’ve inherited your grandfather’s hotel on a foreign continent where everything seems fine on the surface, but rarely is. Develop relationships, skills and your hotel, with 18 beautiful and fleshed out characters. Harem Hotel includes hundreds of fully animated and uncensored lewd scenes, an array of stats, traits, outfits, and upgrades to buy and unlock, dozens of hours of content, over 1,030 unique events, over 32,500 HD images, and way, way more to come.

item.title: Bright Lord 光明领主
item.description:
Bright Lord [v1.15.0 Patreon] [KissKiss Studio]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Bright Lord is an adult, erotic horror game in which you become Bright Lord’s servant. Will you let him take over your mind completely or fight his will in his conquest for power and revenge?
Spoiler
  • Story Follow the story of a man whose life is changed forever when he meets a paranormal demon. Which uses your body to fight his battles. You try to resist his will, but the more you try, it just makes you get more and more corrupted. It gets to the point where you have to use the demon’s help to do the right thing. But his help affects everyone around you, to a point where there is no going back. No power can resist him, but at least your choices can stop corruption on people that you love.

item.title: That New Teacher 那位新老师
item.description:
That New Teacher [v0.8.0] [RogueOne]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You’ve just been hired at a prestigious and unconventional institute of higher learning, known for its ground-breaking curriculum, radical pedagogical methods, and strict disciplinary policies. Your new position is unlike any other: you are The Enforcer.
  • As The Enforcer, you are the sole authority responsible for administering discipline across the student body, with complete discretion. The Institute’s enigmatic benefactors have established a controversial behavioral system known as the PARE Program (Performance and Accountability through Reward and Enforcement). This initiative empowers you to manage students through a carefully structured balance of incentives and consequences, based on their academic performance, conduct, and adherence to institutional expectations.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

  • 发行日期：2025-12-20

更新日志
  • 33,000 New Words
  • 1800 New Images
  • 97 New Animations
  • 12 new unlockable photos!
  • Added a short prologue to the start of the game, to smooth over the introduction.
  • Redesigned ENTIRE UI (again)
  • Changed Georgia’s first unlockable Photo
  • New Profile page backgrounds: Chrissy, Daphne
  • Redesigned Daphne
  • Updated all characters
  • Added Episode skipper (Enabled via Options Menu)
  • Pre-defined save per-episode, or craft your own via choices.
  • Buncha new music and SFX
  • New fonts for better readability (again)
  • A severe loss of sanity
  • Fixed bugs I can’t even remember what they were anymore

item.title: My Bully Is My Lover 我的爱人是恶女
item.description:
My Bully Is My Lover [Chapter 2 - Episode 1 [BETA]] [NiiChan]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In this emotionally charged narrative-driven game, you step into the shoes of a protagonist who has endured the scars of high school bullying. Haunted by memories of a girl who made life unbearable, you’ve journeyed through both literal and metaphorical realms of heaven and hell, reshaping your identity and vowing for retribution. Yet, as adulthood dawns, you realize the futility of clinging to past grudges and choose a path of moving forward.
Spoiler
  • But fate has a twist in store. Your tranquil life is upended when the same high-school bully, along with her friends become your housemates, thanks to your landlady’s new rental arrangements. Unprepared and unnerved, you brace for a resurgence of old conflicts. However, what unfolds is a journey far more profound and unexpected.
  • “My Bully is My Lover” is more than a game; it’s a journey of healing, understanding, and the unexpected ways of life intertwine. Prepare to embark on a path where past pain paves the way for growth and unlikely bonds.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Chapter 2 - Episode 1
  • 发行日期：2026-01-03

Changelog

更新日志
  • 1073+ images
  • 8611 lines of code (6131 main content + 2480 phone content)
  • 41 animations
  • Klara’s 1st Arc
  • Introduction to Emma’s Final Arc
  • Introduction to Naomi’s Final Arc
  • New: Phone System
  • 82 new background music & SFX

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord
  • SubscribeStar
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏在大陆被奉为神作的存在，但是我客观对比了一下，真心一般，东一块西一块的，当然，以上评价来自于外网f95的评价，与我本人无关，这次落谦上传的是官中版本的，克拉拉画廊是有bug。

item.title: Breeze of Passion 激情之风
item.description:
Breeze of Passion [v9.01 Extra] [L7team]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《Breeze of Passion》是一款成人游戏。你扮演一名年轻小伙，搬到海边小镇，协助复兴一家酒店。这部视觉小说满是漂亮女孩、火辣 MILF 和意想不到的剧情反转，并配有高质量画面与劲爆动画。

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：9.01 Extra
  • 发行日期：2025-05-14

Changelog

更新日志
  • Hey there, everyone!
  • We are overjoyed to finally be able to present you with the new big expansion for Breeze of Passion — Deep Inspection!
  • This is not just another game update, but a standalone story sequel with a huge amount of content!
  • We worked very hard to make it special and give you the opportunity to be with your favorite characters again in the vortex of events that awaits you!
  • When it comes to this expansion, we definitely didn’t waste time.
  • It features about 5300(!!!) new images and tons and tons of animations, including full-length mocap pole dances of various girls.
  • We’ve gotten access to XSens motion capture equipment, including StretchSense Studio Pro gloves. We are currently experimenting with it and trying to figure out how it can improve the quality of our games.
  • If you didn’t already know, half of our team consists of girls. Which means they take part in creating many of the scenes you see in the game. Also, a lot of mocap animations in this update were made by the same girls
  • At the same time, we can proudly say that we do not use AI in our creative process. For example, the OST, among many other things, was licensed from real composers.
  • Absolutely everything you see in the world created by L7team is produced by living and breathing people, who love their craft and try very hard to make sure you have a lot of fun with the game!
  • Next on the menu is the final update of MILFs of Sunville.
  • We are already starting to work on it.
  • But don’t you worry. Just like with Breeze of Passion, you can look forward to more unforgettable and amazing content to be added for that game, even after that.
  • By supporting us, you help preserve the community of people who share your passions and work hard to make you a little happier ❤
  • Enjoy the Game!

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Steam
  • Discord

item.title: Driven by Desire 情欲驱动
item.description:
Driven by Desire [v0.3.5 Public] [KloppStyle]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A simple boy from the village, having reached adulthood and finished his studies, during his everyday rural routine asks himself the question - “What’s next? Will I stay here forever or will I overcome my fears and try my hand in the big city?” Will the big city lure the young man with sexy girls and great prospects, or will he stay in the village and never experience the world beyond?​

item.title: The Better Deal 更好的交易
item.description:
The Better Deal [v0.8b] [Ze-gam-eZ]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A story-focused, highly animated visual novel with several love interests, both male and female.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.8b
  • 发行日期：2025-12-18

Changelog

更新日志
  • The update contains some bug fixes, fixed typos and translations.
  • This update covers Chapter 3 — the climax of the story. While the earlier parts of the game focused on determining the main heroine’s love interest, here you’ll be making choices between life and death. And of course, all your previous decisions still have a major impact on how the story unfolds.
  • The update adds 1,657 images, 34 animations, 5 music tracks, and 34 sound effects. In terms of content volume, it’s roughly equal to the very first release of the game (the one on Steam). However, because the story branches extensively, each individual path won’t be very long — which I hope is clear.
  • This update includes all the bad endings. If you manage to complete this chapter, everything ahead will be only good endings, plus one or two “gray” ones.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Steam
  • Subscribestar

item.title: Color of My Sound 我声音的颜色
item.description:
Color of My Sound [Ch.4a] [Gallant Trombe]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Color of My Sound is a Sci-Fi Thriller and Erotic visual novel.
  • The story began when a rebellion erupted across the Empire’s worlds on an unprecedented scale and humanity faced an uncertain future for the first time since the Empire’s inception.
  • Follow the story of the Officer, as he carefully manoeuvres around the machinations of various powers of the Empire, each vying for his allegiance or death…
  • As the commanding officer of Special Operations Squad “Nu”, form camaraderie, rivalry, and even romance with your team members. Careful, each member has their own hidden agenda and personal stake. Pay careful attention, trust no one. You will need to earn the loyalty, perhaps even the love of each member to survive…​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Dawnfall 黎明之秋
item.description:
Dawnfall [v0.2] [Zebual]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Dawnfall is a modern fantasy visual novel that follows a young man about to start his university life, unaware that secrets tied to his past and destiny are slowly awakening. Vampires, witches, and angels aren’t just stories… they exist, hidden within a delicate balance that’s beginning to crack. As a member of a secret organization called Veilkeepers, Rex will be forced to face not only the darkness stirring beneath the surface… but also the truth of who he really is. Your choices will shape fate, maybe even the fate of the world.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

item.title: Cradle Beyond the Veil 异界摇篮
item.description:
City Devil: Restart [v0.4.0 Public] [Sabirow]

Overview

剧情概要
  • This isn’t your usual life sim with predictable drama and a checklist of girls to… well, you know.
  • Instead, our visual novel offers something for everyone — from high-quality adult scenes and animations that won’t disappoint, to a carefully crafted world and story for those who enjoy deeper immersion. We believe you’ll find plenty to enjoy as you start exploring Cradle at its very beginning.
  • We’ve aimed to create a visual novel that stands out — and we believe we’ve built a solid foundation for something truly special. If you’re curious to explore a story somewhere between fiction and “wait, that could actually happen” — welcome.

item.title: Wild Cats 野猫
item.description:
Wild Cats [v0.3 Public] [LopaPhi]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You are a highly anticipated up and coming volleyball star. Or rather, you were up until you destroyed your shoulder and your prospects along with it by overworking yourself. Now you’re just a nobody who drowned your sorrows away with a series of poor life choices.
Spoiler

  • This story takes place after a wake up call following a year of wallowing in despair with a life that spiralled downhill under the shadow of the star volleyball prospect you once were. You have just received a vague invitation for a meeting from the Dean of Baskerville State University, a highly prestigious university, regarding a potential scholarship when no other universities would give the current you a second glance.

  • The condition of this scholarship however would turn out to be facing your demons as you return to the sport you turned your back on in a new role, becoming the coach of the school’s women’s volleyball team.

  • But little did you know that facing your demons would be the easiest part of this task as the team is riddled with fatal problems, each threatening to end your scholarship left, right, and centre! Yet by earnestly facing these girls and their issues with your eyes wide open, you might just end up growing in a way you never thought you would. Are you ready to coach the BSU Wild Cats and lead them to victory?

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.3 Public

Changelog

更新日志
  • 47,000+ Words
  • 1750 Images
  • 19 Animations
  • 10,000 lines of code
  • Chinese Translations implemented. Russian, French, and Spanish translations will follow.

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《禁忌幻想》是一款由选择推动情节发展的成人向视觉小说游戏，而你正是天选之子。成为预言中的英雄，和女精灵谈情说爱并从恶魔女王手中拯救世界。你的征程将充满冒险、曲折和海量的性爱内容。

item.title: City Devil 城市恶魔
item.description:
City Devil: Restart [v0.4.0 Public] [Sabirow]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In a new city, you start a fresh chapter of your life by enrolling in a high school. Embarking on this thrilling journey, you’ll encounter a diverse group of friends, including charming and beautiful girls. As you explore the town and its inhabitants, you will realize something mysterious and disturbing is happening here. Strange people and unexplained phenomena seem to haunt you. MC’s frequent nightmares add a creepy element to the story. As you interact with various characters, you will also have to make decisions that will affect the game’s outcome. Your choices will determine the course of the story and the relationships you form with other characters.

item.title: Heliorise 曦升之城
item.description:
Heliorise [v0.2.1] [JBReverse]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Since childhood, you’ve been an orphan with no family. But on the day you come of age, a mysterious letter arrives - you have a sister. She lives in the world’s largest city - Heliorise, and sincerely invites you to reunite. Is she truly your long-lost family? Why reach now? What does she want after all these years? Only one thing is certain - your life is about to change forever…

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

  • 发行日期：2025-11-14

item.title: Mayfly 蜉蝣
item.description:
Mayfly [v0.2 Reset] [JasonTon]

Overview

游戏概述

  • “The city’s sewers stink of blood and rust. Portraits of the wealthy and powerful line the streets, attempting to cover up the heinous crimes they’ve committed.”

  • “Is it truly brightness and warmth that meets you after suffering?” your life.

Spoiler

  • The story is set in the city of Devon, the country’s only mega city. Plagued by a glaring wealth gap, Devon eventually divided into the Uppercity, where company execs and corpos live amidst opulence and luxury, and the Undercity, where factory workers and gangsters, including triads, dwell.

  • A decade ago, a phenomenon of unknown origin resulted in the sudden emergence of superpowers among individuals in and around the city, primarily among teenagers. However, this unexpected development presented a formidable challenge for the government, as these superpowered individuals started to engage in criminal activities. In particular, they targeted the Uppercity due to deep-rooted inequality, resorting to acts such as kidnapping and murder of the wealthy.

  • To tackle the rising crime rates, the government is compelled to implement two bills: the Vigilante Act and the Superpowers Act. The former empowers selected individuals with superpowers to go beyond traditional law enforcement measures to combat criminals, while the latter treats superpowered individuals differently from regular humans, eliminating age restrictions and establishing dedicated prisons for them.

  • Over time, superpowered crime in Devon steadily decreased thanks to the state-funded Vigilantes who are entrusted with the task of upholding justice. However, as the Vigilante force expanded, the balance started to shift as some Vigilantes with concealed motives became a new source of instability in the city. Additionally, after the initial surge of superpowers, no new superpowers have emerged in Devon. This results in a growing public demand for the abolition of the Vigilante Bill, and a change in public perception of Vigilantes from once-revered heroes to a more critical stance.

  • In such a setting, where you are a member of the Vigilantes, are you truly willing to let others dictate your fate? I believe the answer is unequivocally “Never.” Every decision you make, whether significant or seemingly inconsequential, has the potential to impact the relationships and alliances you form during your journey.

  • Is it to live fleetingly like a mayfly in this superficially vibrant city, or to leave a lasting legacy as a legend in the streets?

  • “The power to determine your destiny rests in your hands.”

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.2 Reset
  • 原版发布日：2025-01-22

Changelog

更新日志
  • 1135+ New Renders
  • 14 new animated CGs
  • 3100+ entirely new lines of story text
  • 6850+ entirely new lines of code
  • 30+ new music tracks
  • 100+ new sound effects
  • New end credits scene
  • The rendering quality has been significantly enhanced
  • Added Volumetric Light/Volumetric Fog
  • Higher-polygon models and new skeletal rigs have been added to the characters, allowing for more refined and detailed body movements
  • The MC’s model and skin have been updated, making him look… more handsome, perhaps?
  • Significant optimizations have been made to the transitions and sound effects in version 0.1, with a revision rate of over 70%
  • A cheat document has been added… Open it, and it will guide you on which choices to make

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Discord
  • Twitter
